snippet.title: VAARI JAAVAN (Full Video)| Dhurandhar The Revenge| Ranveer Singh| Shashwat Sachdev,Jyoti N,Jasmine S
snippet.description:
Presenting the Full Video Song "Vaari Jaavan", from the film #DhurandharTheRevenge.

Credits: 
Jio Studios Presents
A B62 Studios Production

An Aditya Dhar Film
DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE

Written, Directed and Produced by: Aditya Dhar
Produced by: Jyoti Deshpande
Produced by: Lokesh Dhar

Cast : Ranveer Singh | Sanjay Dutt | R. Madhavan | Arjun Rampal | Sara Arjun

A Shashwat Sachdev Musical

♪Full Song Available on♪ 
JioSaavn: https://bit.ly/4bzKl4j
Spotify: https://bit.ly/4bC8CGX
Apple Music: https://bit.ly/4bAdtIQ
Gaana: https://bit.ly/3NEjs7e
Amazon Prime Music: https://bit.ly/3NINjeS
YouTube Music: https://bit.ly/4bpscHI

Audio Credits
Song - Vaari Jaavan
Music - Shashwat Sachdev
Singer - Jyoti Nooran, Reble
Lyrics - Jasmine Sandlas, Reble
Mixing by Akash Shravan
Music Label - T-Series

#VaariJaavan 

Lyrics:
Pachchi pindaan da sardar mera yaar ni
Jitt ke main ohnu ajj dill gayi aan haar ni
Ishq-e-majaazi da taaj sir te paa liya
Sohna-sunakkha enna jaan devan vaar ni
Pachchi pindaan da sardar mera yaar ni
Jitt ke main ohnu ajj dill gayi aan haar ni
Ishq-e-majaazi da taaj sir te paa liya
Jad vi bulaave sohna daudi main aavan

Ni main vaari jaavan mera sohna ae yaar
Ni main vaari jaavan ve main dill gayi aan haar
Ni main vaari jaavan mera sohna hathyaar
O ni main vaari jaavan ni main vaari vaari

He’s so sweet can’t feel my face
When i met him it feels like sin
Your majesty come be my grace
And mercy on my inner self

Ni main vaari jaavan mera sohna ae yaar
Ni main vaari jaavan ve main dill gayi aan haar
Ni main vaari jaavan mera sohna hathyaar
O ni main vaari jaavan ni main vaari vaari

Vaili de kisse dekho hoye mashhoor ve
Vairi vi vekh hoye majboor ve
Bandekhane de raundan de gehne main paavan
Jo bulaave sohna te main daudi aavan

Ni main vaari jaavan mera sohna ae yaar
Ni main vaari jaavan ve main dill gayi aan haar
Ni main vaari jaavan mera sohna hathyaar
O ni main vaari jaavan ni main vaari vaari

snippet.title: UP Home Guard Polity Marathon Class, Home Guard गागर में सागर, UP Police Home Guard Polity Marathon
snippet.description:
UP Home Guard Polity Marathon Class | Home Guard गागर में सागर | UP Police Home Guard Polity PYQs & Expected Questions By Ajeet Sir 
Join us for the UP Home Guard Polity Marathon Class where we dive deep into the most crucial topics for the UP Police Home Guard Exam. This special session, Home Guard गागर में सागर, will cover key Polity concepts, Past Year Questions (PYQs), and expected questions that can boost your chances of acing the exam. Ajeet Sir, with his years of experience, will help simplify complex topics and make them easier to grasp. Whether you're a beginner or someone looking to revise important Polity sections, this class is designed for you!

We will discuss various topics related to Indian Polity, including the Constitution of India, Fundamental Rights, Fundamental Duties, and the working of the Indian Parliament, among others. Ajeet Sir will take you through each concept with detailed explanations and practical tips to improve your exam preparation.

This marathon class is a must-watch for every aspirant preparing for the UP Police Home Guard Exam. Gain confidence and clarity on important questions that are likely to appear in the exam. Don’t miss out on this golden opportunity to prepare with a seasoned educator!

#UPHomeGuardPolityMarathon #HomeGuardPolityClass #PolityForHomeGuardExam #UPPoliceExamPreparation #HomeGuardPolity #AjeetSirClasses #PolityPYQs #UPHomeGuardExam #IndianPolity #IndianConstitution #PolityForUPHomeGuard #UPPoliceHomeGuard #HomeGuard2026 #UPPoliceMarathon #UPHomeGuardPreparation #UPHomeGuardQuestions #UPExamPreparation #PolityMarathonClass #HomeGuardExam

localized.title: UP Home Guard Polity Marathon Class, Home Guard गागर में सागर, UP Police Home Guard Polity Marathon
localized.description:
UP Home Guard Polity Marathon Class | Home Guard गागर में सागर | UP Police Home Guard Polity PYQs & Expected Questions By Ajeet Sir 
Join us for the UP Home Guard Polity Marathon Class where we dive deep into the most crucial topics for the UP Police Home Guard Exam. This special session, Home Guard गागर में सागर, will cover key Polity concepts, Past Year Questions (PYQs), and expected questions that can boost your chances of acing the exam. Ajeet Sir, with his years of experience, will help simplify complex topics and make them easier to grasp. Whether you're a beginner or someone looking to revise important Polity sections, this class is designed for you!

We will discuss various topics related to Indian Polity, including the Constitution of India, Fundamental Rights, Fundamental Duties, and the working of the Indian Parliament, among others. Ajeet Sir will take you through each concept with detailed explanations and practical tips to improve your exam preparation.

This marathon class is a must-watch for every aspirant preparing for the UP Police Home Guard Exam. Gain confidence and clarity on important questions that are likely to appear in the exam. Don’t miss out on this golden opportunity to prepare with a seasoned educator!

snippet.description:

snippet.title: Street Fighter | Official Trailer (2026 Movie)
snippet.description:
FIGHT! Watch the Official Trailer for #StreetFighterMovie, hitting theaters everywhere October 16.  

Set in 1993, estranged Street Fighters Ryu (Andrew Koji) and Ken Masters (Noah Centineo) are thrown back into combat when the mysterious Chun-Li (Callina Liang) recruits them for the next World Warrior Tournament: a brutal clash of fists, fate, and fury. But behind this battle royale lies a deadly conspiracy that forces them to face off against each other and the demons of their past. And if they don’t, it’s GAME OVER!

Helmed by director Kitao Sakurai, Street Fighter is set to bring the battle from the arcade to the big screen with Hadoukens, roundhouses, and all your favorite characters.

Connect with #StreetFighterMovie online:
Website: https://www.streetfightermovie.com/ 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/streetfightermovie/
X: https://x.com/Street_fighter
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/StreetfighterMovie/
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@streetfightermovie
Threads: https://www.threads.com/@streetfightermovie

Paramount Pictures Corporation (PPC), a global producer and distributor of filmed entertainment, is a unit of Paramount, a Skydance Corporation (NASDAQ: PSKY), a leading next-generation global media and entertainment company comprised of three business segments: Filmed Entertainment, Direct-to-Consumer, and TV Media. Paramount Pictures has some of the most powerful brands in filmed entertainment, including Paramount Pictures and Paramount Animation. PPC operations also include Paramount Home Entertainment, Paramount Pictures International, Paramount Licensing Inc., and Paramount Studio Group.

Connect with Paramount Pictures online:
Official Site: http://www.paramount.com/
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@paramountpics
Instagram: http://www.instagram.com/ParamountPics
Twitter: https://twitter.com/paramountpics
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/user/Paramount
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Paramount

Set in 1993, estranged Street Fighters Ryu (Andrew Koji) and Ken Masters (Noah Centineo) are thrown back into combat when the mysterious Chun-Li (Callina Liang) recruits them for the next World Warrior Tournament: a brutal clash of fists, fate, and fury. But behind this battle royale lies a deadly conspiracy that forces them to face off against each other and the demons of their past. And if they don’t, it’s GAME OVER!

Helmed by director Kitao Sakurai, Street Fighter is set to bring the battle from the arcade to the big screen with Hadoukens, roundhouses, and all your favorite characters.

Paramount Pictures has some of the most powerful brands in filmed entertainment, including Paramount Pictures and Paramount Animation. PPC operations also include Paramount Home Entertainment, Paramount Pictures International, Paramount Licensing Inc., and Paramount Studio Group.

snippet.title: Avengers: Doomsday - First Trailer "The Last Thunder God" | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
snippet.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr 

Watch the 'FAN (CONCEPT) Trailer Concept' For Marvel Studios' Avengers: Doomsday (2026) (More Info About This Video Down Below!)


Avengers: Doomsday marks a major escalation in the Marvel universe as a new global and multiversal crisis forces Earth’s mightiest heroes into their most dangerous battle yet. With reality itself beginning to fracture, the emergence of Doctor Doom introduces a threat defined by intelligence, precision, and absolute ambition. The trailer sets a darker tone, showcasing large-scale destruction, collapsing worlds, and heroes struggling to maintain control in an increasingly unstable environment. As new and returning characters come together, the line between survival and defeat becomes thinner than ever.

The story explores a future where power alone may not be enough to stop what is coming, as Doom’s influence spreads through strategy, technology, and manipulation across multiple realities. The Avengers must face not only a powerful enemy, but also the consequences of a universe already pushed to its limits. Alliances are tested, leadership is challenged, and every decision carries weight beyond a single timeline. With massive action sequences, high emotional stakes, and strong crossover potential, Avengers: Doomsday stands as one of Marvel’s most ambitious projects, centered on collapse, resistance, and the fight to protect the future of the multiverse.

Editing, VFX, SFX, Thumbnail by @GalacticTrailerOfficial 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Software I use: Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Unreal Engine 5.5
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

◁ On our channel, we create trailer mashups ▷ Trailer mashups, also known as recut trailers, are crafted by gathering various film footage from one or more movies and re-editing them to form a brand-new trailer. These mashups often depict a movie that doesn’t exist or shift the genre of an existing film. As derivative works defined under the United States Copyright Act 17 U.S.C. § 101, they may be protected from copyright claims under the fair use doctrine.

Trailer mashups are not just a form of user-generated digital creativity but also a unique way to build excitement for upcoming releases, complementing official movie trailers. While traditional trailers tease the plot and generate hype, fan-made mashups let the audience put their own cinematic twist on existing footage. This creative freedom can spotlight a particular actor, emphasize a specific storyline, or even transform the film’s genre entirely.

This video is a parody. Due to its derivative and transformative nature, it is protected under Fair Use.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Thank You So Much For Watching!
May the force be with us, Always!

hi.title: एवेंजर्स: डूम्सडे - पहला ट्रेलर "द लास्ट थंडर गॉड" | क्रिस हेम्सवर्थ | 2026
hi.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr

मार्वल स्टूडियोज़ की फिल्म 'एवेंजर्स: डूम्सडे' (2026) का 'फैन (कॉन्सेप्ट) ट्रेलर' देखें (इस वीडियो के बारे में अधिक जानकारी नीचे दी गई है!)

'एवेंजर्स: डूम्सडे' मार्वल ब्रह्मांड में एक बड़ा बदलाव लेकर आती है, जब एक नया वैश्विक और बहु-ब्रह्मांडीय संकट पृथ्वी के सबसे शक्तिशाली नायकों को अब तक की सबसे खतरनाक लड़ाई में धकेल देता है। वास्तविकता के टूटने के कगार पर पहुँचने के साथ ही, डॉक्टर डूम का उदय एक ऐसे खतरे को जन्म देता है जो बुद्धिमत्ता, सटीकता और असीम महत्वाकांक्षा से परिपूर्ण है। ट्रेलर एक भयावह माहौल बनाता है, जिसमें बड़े पैमाने पर विनाश, ढहती दुनियाएँ और नायकों को तेजी से अस्थिर होते वातावरण में नियंत्रण बनाए रखने के लिए संघर्ष करते हुए दिखाया गया है। जैसे-जैसे नए और पुराने किरदार एक साथ आते हैं, अस्तित्व और हार के बीच की रेखा पहले से कहीं अधिक पतली हो जाती है।

कहानी एक ऐसे भविष्य की पड़ताल करती है जहाँ अकेले शक्ति आने वाले खतरे को रोकने के लिए पर्याप्त नहीं हो सकती है, क्योंकि डूम का प्रभाव रणनीति, प्रौद्योगिकी और हेरफेर के माध्यम से कई वास्तविकताओं में फैलता है। एवेंजर्स को न केवल एक शक्तिशाली दुश्मन का सामना करना होगा, बल्कि एक ऐसे ब्रह्मांड के परिणामों से भी जूझना होगा जो पहले से ही अपनी चरम सीमा पर पहुँच चुका है। गठबंधनों की परीक्षा होती है, नेतृत्व को चुनौती मिलती है, और हर निर्णय का महत्व एक समयरेखा से कहीं अधिक होता है। ज़बरदस्त एक्शन दृश्यों, गहन भावनात्मक दांव-पेच और मजबूत क्रॉसओवर संभावनाओं के साथ, एवेंजर्स: डूम्सडे मार्वल की सबसे महत्वाकांक्षी परियोजनाओं में से एक है, जो पतन, प्रतिरोध और बहुब्रह्मांड के भविष्य की रक्षा के संघर्ष पर केंद्रित है।

संपादन, वीएफएक्स, एसएफएक्स, थंबनेल: @GalacticTrailerOfficial

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
मैं जिन सॉफ़्टवेयर का उपयोग करता हूँ: एडोब प्रीमियर, आफ्टर इफेक्ट्स, फोटोशॉप, एडोब ऑडिशन, अनरियल इंजन 5.5
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

◁ हमारे चैनल पर, हम ट्रेलर मैशअप बनाते हैं ▷ ट्रेलर मैशअप, जिन्हें रिकट ट्रेलर भी कहा जाता है, एक या अधिक फिल्मों के विभिन्न फुटेज को इकट्ठा करके और उन्हें फिर से संपादित करके एक बिल्कुल नया ट्रेलर बनाने से तैयार किए जाते हैं। ये मैशअप अक्सर किसी ऐसी फिल्म को दर्शाते हैं जो अस्तित्व में नहीं है या किसी मौजूदा फिल्म की शैली को बदल देते हैं। संयुक्त राज्य अमेरिका के कॉपीराइट अधिनियम 17 यू.एस.सी. § 101 के तहत परिभाषित व्युत्पन्न कार्यों के रूप में, इन्हें उचित उपयोग सिद्धांत के तहत कॉपीराइट दावों से सुरक्षा मिल सकती है।

ट्रेलर मैशअप न केवल उपयोगकर्ता-निर्मित डिजिटल रचनात्मकता का एक रूप हैं, बल्कि आगामी रिलीज़ के लिए उत्साह बढ़ाने का एक अनूठा तरीका भी हैं, जो आधिकारिक फिल्म ट्रेलरों के पूरक हैं। जहां पारंपरिक ट्रेलर कथानक का संकेत देते हैं और प्रचार उत्पन्न करते हैं, वहीं प्रशंसक-निर्मित मैशअप दर्शकों को मौजूदा फुटेज पर अपना सिनेमाई अंदाज़ जोड़ने की अनुमति देते हैं। यह रचनात्मक स्वतंत्रता किसी विशेष अभिनेता को उजागर कर सकती है, किसी विशिष्ट कहानी पर ज़ोर दे सकती है, या फिल्म की शैली को पूरी तरह से बदल भी सकती है।

यह वीडियो एक पैरोडी है। इसकी व्युत्पन्न और रूपांतरणात्मक प्रकृति के कारण, इसे उचित उपयोग के तहत संरक्षित किया गया है।

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
देखने के लिए बहुत-बहुत धन्यवाद!
शक्ति हमेशा हमारे साथ रहे!

it.title: Avengers: Doomsday - Primo trailer "L'ultimo dio del tuono" | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
it.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr

Guarda il 'Concept del trailer dei fan' per Avengers: Doomsday (2026) dei Marvel Studios (Maggiori informazioni su questo video qui sotto!)

Avengers: Doomsday segna una svolta decisiva nell'universo Marvel, con una nuova crisi globale e multiversale che costringe i più potenti eroi della Terra ad affrontare la battaglia più pericolosa di sempre. Con la realtà stessa che inizia a frammentarsi, l'emergere del Dottor Destino introduce una minaccia definita da intelligenza, precisione e ambizione assoluta. Il trailer adotta un tono più cupo, mostrando distruzione su vasta scala, mondi che collassano ed eroi che lottano per mantenere il controllo in un ambiente sempre più instabile. Mentre personaggi nuovi e di ritorno si uniscono, il confine tra sopravvivenza e sconfitta si fa più sottile che mai.

La storia esplora un futuro in cui il solo potere potrebbe non bastare a fermare ciò che sta arrivando, poiché l'influenza di Destino si diffonde attraverso strategia, tecnologia e manipolazione in molteplici realtà. Gli Avengers devono affrontare non solo un nemico potente, ma anche le conseguenze di un universo già spinto al limite. Le alleanze vengono messe alla prova, la leadership è sfidata e ogni decisione ha un peso che va ben oltre una singola linea temporale. Con sequenze d'azione spettacolari, una forte carica emotiva e un grande potenziale di crossover, Avengers: Doomsday si conferma come uno dei progetti più ambiziosi della Marvel, incentrato sul collasso, la resistenza e la lotta per proteggere il futuro del multiverso.

Montaggio, effetti visivi, effetti sonori, miniatura a cura di @GalacticTrailerOfficial

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Software che utilizzo: Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Unreal Engine 5.5
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

◁ Sul nostro canale creiamo mashup di trailer ▷ I mashup di trailer, noti anche come trailer rimontati, sono realizzati raccogliendo diverse sequenze video da uno o più film e rimontandole per creare un trailer completamente nuovo. Questi mashup spesso raffigurano un film inesistente o ne modificano il genere. Essendo opere derivate, come definite dalla legge statunitense sul diritto d'autore (17 U.S.C. § 101), possono essere protetti da rivendicazioni di copyright in base alla dottrina del "fair use" (uso lecito).

I mashup di trailer non sono solo una forma di creatività digitale generata dagli utenti, ma anche un modo unico per creare attesa per le prossime uscite, integrando i trailer ufficiali. Mentre i trailer tradizionali anticipano la trama e generano clamore, i mashup realizzati dai fan permettono al pubblico di dare la propria interpretazione cinematografica al materiale esistente. Questa libertà creativa può mettere in risalto un particolare attore, enfatizzare una specifica trama o persino trasformare completamente il genere del film.

Questo video è una parodia. Data la sua natura derivata e trasformativa, è protetto dal "fair use".

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Grazie mille per la visione!
Che la Forza sia con noi, sempre!

pt-BR.title: Vingadores: Apocalipse - Primeiro trailer "O Último Deus do Trovão" | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
pt-BR.description:
#Vingadores #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr

Assista ao trailer conceitual de fã para Vingadores: O Juízo Final (2026) da Marvel Studios (Mais informações sobre este vídeo abaixo!)

Vingadores: O Juízo Final marca uma grande escalada no universo Marvel, com uma nova crise global e multiversal forçando os heróis mais poderosos da Terra a enfrentarem sua batalha mais perigosa até então. Com a própria realidade começando a se fragmentar, o surgimento do Doutor Destino introduz uma ameaça definida por inteligência, precisão e ambição absoluta. O trailer estabelece um tom mais sombrio, mostrando destruição em larga escala, mundos em colapso e heróis lutando para manter o controle em um ambiente cada vez mais instável. À medida que personagens novos e antigos se unem, a linha entre a sobrevivência e a derrota se torna mais tênue do que nunca.

A história explora um futuro onde o poder por si só pode não ser suficiente para impedir o que está por vir, já que a influência de Destino se espalha por meio de estratégia, tecnologia e manipulação em múltiplas realidades. Os Vingadores precisam enfrentar não apenas um inimigo poderoso, mas também as consequências de um universo já levado ao limite. Alianças são testadas, lideranças são desafiadas e cada decisão tem um peso que transcende uma única linha do tempo. Com sequências de ação massivas, alto impacto emocional e grande potencial para crossovers, Vingadores: Apocalipse se destaca como um dos projetos mais ambiciosos da Marvel, centrado no colapso, na resistência e na luta para proteger o futuro do multiverso.

Edição, VFX, SFX e miniatura por @GalacticTrailerOfficial

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Softwares que utilizo: Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Unreal Engine 5.5
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

◁ Em nosso canal, criamos mashups de trailers ▷ Mashups de trailers, também conhecidos como trailers reeditados, são criados reunindo diversas cenas de um ou mais filmes e reeditando-as para formar um trailer totalmente novo. Essas montagens frequentemente retratam um filme que não existe ou alteram o gênero de um filme já existente. Como obras derivadas, conforme definido pela Lei de Direitos Autorais dos Estados Unidos (17 U.S.C. § 101), elas podem ser protegidas de reivindicações de direitos autorais sob a doutrina do uso justo.

As montagens de trailers não são apenas uma forma de criatividade digital gerada pelo usuário, mas também uma maneira única de criar expectativa para lançamentos futuros, complementando os trailers oficiais dos filmes. Enquanto os trailers tradicionais antecipam o enredo e geram entusiasmo, as montagens feitas por fãs permitem que o público dê seu próprio toque cinematográfico às cenas existentes. Essa liberdade criativa pode destacar um ator específico, enfatizar um enredo específico ou até mesmo transformar completamente o gênero do filme.

Este vídeo é uma paródia. Devido à sua natureza derivada e transformadora, ele é protegido pelo uso justo.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Que a força esteja conosco, sempre!

de-DE.title: Avengers: Doomsday – Erster Trailer „Der letzte Donnergott“ | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
de-DE.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr

Seht euch den Fan-Trailer (Konzept) zu Marvel Studios' Avengers: Doomsday (2026) an! (Mehr Infos zum Video weiter unten!)

Avengers: Doomsday markiert einen Wendepunkt im Marvel-Universum: Eine neue globale und multiversale Krise zwingt die mächtigsten Helden der Erde in ihren bisher gefährlichsten Kampf. Die Realität selbst beginnt zu zerbrechen, und mit dem Auftauchen von Doctor Doom entsteht eine Bedrohung, die von Intelligenz, Präzision und absolutem Ehrgeiz geprägt ist. Der Trailer schlägt einen düsteren Ton an und zeigt Zerstörung im großen Stil, zusammenbrechende Welten und Helden, die in einer zunehmend instabilen Welt um die Kontrolle kämpfen. Neue und wiederkehrende Charaktere treffen aufeinander, und der Grat zwischen Überleben und Niederlage wird dünner denn je.

Die Geschichte erkundet eine Zukunft, in der Macht allein nicht mehr ausreicht, um das Kommende aufzuhalten, denn Dooms Einfluss breitet sich durch Strategie, Technologie und Manipulation über verschiedene Realitäten aus. Die Avengers müssen sich nicht nur einem mächtigen Feind stellen, sondern auch den Folgen eines Universums, das bereits am Rande seiner Kräfte ist. Allianzen werden auf die Probe gestellt, Führungsqualitäten herausgefordert, und jede Entscheidung hat weitreichende Konsequenzen, die über die Grenzen einer einzelnen Zeitlinie hinausgehen. Mit gewaltigen Actionsequenzen, emotionaler Wucht und großem Crossover-Potenzial zählt Avengers: Doomsday zu den ambitioniertesten Projekten von Marvel. Im Mittelpunkt stehen der Zusammenbruch, der Widerstand und der Kampf um die Zukunft des Multiversums.

Schnitt, VFX, SFX, Thumbnail von @GalacticTrailerOfficial

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Verwendete Software: Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Unreal Engine 5.5
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

◁ Auf unserem Kanal erstellen wir Trailer-Mashups. ▷ Trailer-Mashups, auch bekannt als Recut-Trailer, entstehen durch das Zusammenschneiden verschiedener Filmsequenzen aus einem oder mehreren Filmen zu einem brandneuen Trailer. Diese Mashups stellen oft einen fiktiven Film dar oder verändern das Genre eines bestehenden Films. Als abgeleitete Werke im Sinne des US-amerikanischen Urheberrechtsgesetzes (17 U.S.C. § 101) können sie unter Umständen durch die Fair-Use-Doktrin vor Urheberrechtsansprüchen geschützt sein.

Trailer-Mashups sind nicht nur eine Form nutzergenerierter digitaler Kreativität, sondern auch eine einzigartige Möglichkeit, die Vorfreude auf kommende Veröffentlichungen zu steigern und offizielle Filmtrailer zu ergänzen. Während traditionelle Trailer die Handlung andeuten und Hype erzeugen, ermöglichen Fan-Mashups dem Publikum, bestehendes Filmmaterial auf ihre eigene filmische Art zu interpretieren. Diese kreative Freiheit kann einen bestimmten Schauspieler ins Rampenlicht rücken, eine bestimmte Handlung hervorheben oder sogar das Genre des Films komplett verändern.

Dieses Video ist eine Parodie. Aufgrund seines abgeleiteten und transformativen Charakters ist es durch die Fair-Use-Doktrin geschützt.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Vielen Dank fürs Zuschauen! Möge die Macht mit uns sein!

fr-FR.title: Avengers : Doomsday - Première bande-annonce « Le dernier dieu du tonnerre » | Chris Hemsworth | ...
fr-FR.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr

Découvrez le concept de bande-annonce (FAN) pour Avengers : Doomsday (2026) des studios Marvel (Plus d'infos ci-dessous !)

Avengers : Doomsday marque un tournant majeur dans l'univers Marvel. Une nouvelle crise mondiale et multiverselle contraint les plus grands héros de la Terre à livrer leur combat le plus périlleux. Alors que la réalité elle-même commence à se fissurer, l'émergence du Docteur Fatalis introduit une menace caractérisée par l'intelligence, la précision et une ambition absolue. La bande-annonce installe une ambiance plus sombre, dévoilant des destructions à grande échelle, des mondes qui s'effondrent et des héros qui luttent pour garder le contrôle dans un environnement de plus en plus instable. Tandis que de nouveaux personnages et des héros de retour se rassemblent, la frontière entre la survie et la défaite est plus ténue que jamais.

L'histoire explore un futur où la force brute ne suffira peut-être pas à arrêter le cataclysme, car l'influence de Fatalis s'étend par la stratégie, la technologie et la manipulation à travers de multiples réalités. Les Avengers doivent affronter non seulement un ennemi redoutable, mais aussi les conséquences d'un univers déjà poussé à ses limites. Les alliances sont mises à l'épreuve, le leadership contesté, et chaque décision a des répercussions bien au-delà d'une simple ligne temporelle. Avec des scènes d'action spectaculaires, une forte charge émotionnelle et un potentiel de crossover important, Avengers : Doomsday s'impose comme l'un des projets les plus ambitieux de Marvel, centré sur l'effondrement, la résistance et la lutte pour protéger l'avenir du multivers.

Montage, effets spéciaux, effets sonores, miniature par @GalacticTrailerOfficial

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Logiciels utilisés : Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Unreal Engine 5.5

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

◁ Sur notre chaîne, nous créons des mashups de bandes-annonces ▷ Les mashups de bandes-annonces, aussi appelés bandes-annonces remaniées, sont réalisés en assemblant des extraits de films issus d'un ou plusieurs longs métrages et en les remontant pour créer une toute nouvelle bande-annonce. Ces mashups mettent souvent en scène un film inexistant ou transforment le genre d'un film existant. En tant qu'œuvres dérivées, telles que définies par la loi américaine sur le droit d'auteur (17 U.S.C. § 101), elles peuvent être protégées contre les réclamations pour atteinte aux droits d'auteur grâce à la doctrine de l'utilisation équitable (fair use).

Les mashups de bandes-annonces ne sont pas seulement une forme de créativité numérique générée par les utilisateurs, mais aussi un moyen original de susciter l'enthousiasme autour des sorties à venir, en complément des bandes-annonces officielles. Tandis que les bandes-annonces traditionnelles dévoilent l'intrigue et créent le buzz, les mashups réalisés par les fans permettent au public d'apporter sa propre touche cinématographique aux images existantes. Cette liberté créative peut mettre en avant un acteur en particulier, souligner une intrigue spécifique, ou même transformer complètement le genre du film.

Cette vidéo est une parodie. De par sa nature dérivée et transformative, elle est protégée par l'utilisation équitable (fair use).

-------------------------------------------------------------------- Merci beaucoup d'avoir regardé !

Que la force soit avec nous !

id.title: Avengers: Doomsday - Trailer Pertama "Dewa Petir Terakhir" | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
id.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr

Tonton 'Konsep Trailer Fan' untuk Avengers: Doomsday (2026) dari Marvel Studios (Informasi Lebih Lanjut Tentang Video Ini di Bawah!)

Avengers: Doomsday menandai peningkatan besar di alam semesta Marvel saat krisis global dan multiversal baru memaksa para pahlawan terkuat Bumi ke dalam pertempuran paling berbahaya mereka. Dengan realitas itu sendiri yang mulai retak, munculnya Doctor Doom memperkenalkan ancaman yang didefinisikan oleh kecerdasan, ketelitian, dan ambisi absolut. Trailer ini menampilkan nuansa yang lebih gelap, memperlihatkan kehancuran skala besar, dunia yang runtuh, dan para pahlawan yang berjuang untuk mempertahankan kendali dalam lingkungan yang semakin tidak stabil. Saat karakter baru dan lama berkumpul, garis antara bertahan hidup dan kekalahan menjadi lebih tipis dari sebelumnya.

Kisah ini mengeksplorasi masa depan di mana kekuatan saja mungkin tidak cukup untuk menghentikan apa yang akan datang, karena pengaruh Doom menyebar melalui strategi, teknologi, dan manipulasi di berbagai realitas. Avengers harus menghadapi bukan hanya musuh yang kuat, tetapi juga konsekuensi dari alam semesta yang sudah mencapai batasnya. Aliansi diuji, kepemimpinan ditantang, dan setiap keputusan memiliki bobot yang melampaui satu garis waktu. Dengan rangkaian aksi besar-besaran, taruhan emosional yang tinggi, dan potensi crossover yang kuat, Avengers: Doomsday berdiri sebagai salah satu proyek Marvel yang paling ambisius, berpusat pada keruntuhan, perlawanan, dan perjuangan untuk melindungi masa depan multiverse.

Penyuntingan, VFX, SFX, Thumbnail oleh @GalacticTrailerOfficial

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Perangkat lunak yang saya gunakan: Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Unreal Engine 5.5
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

◁ Di saluran kami, kami membuat trailer mashup ▷ Trailer mashup, juga dikenal sebagai trailer recut, dibuat dengan mengumpulkan berbagai cuplikan film dari satu atau lebih film dan menyuntingnya kembali untuk membentuk trailer baru. Mashup ini sering menggambarkan film yang tidak ada atau mengubah genre film yang sudah ada. Sebagai karya turunan yang didefinisikan berdasarkan Undang-Undang Hak Cipta Amerika Serikat 17 U.S.C. § 101, karya-karya ini dapat dilindungi dari klaim hak cipta berdasarkan doktrin penggunaan wajar.

Mashup trailer bukan hanya bentuk kreativitas digital yang dihasilkan pengguna, tetapi juga cara unik untuk membangun antusiasme terhadap rilis mendatang, melengkapi trailer film resmi. Sementara trailer tradisional menggoda plot dan menghasilkan hype, mashup buatan penggemar memungkinkan penonton untuk memberikan sentuhan sinematik mereka sendiri pada cuplikan yang sudah ada. Kebebasan kreatif ini dapat menyoroti aktor tertentu, menekankan alur cerita tertentu, atau bahkan mengubah genre film sepenuhnya.

Video ini adalah parodi. Karena sifatnya yang turunan dan transformatif, video ini dilindungi berdasarkan Penggunaan Wajar.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Terima Kasih Banyak Telah Menonton!

Semoga kekuatan selalu menyertai kita!

es-US.title: Vengadores: El fin del mundo - Primer tráiler "El último dios del trueno" | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
es-US.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr

Mira el tráiler conceptual creado por fans de Avengers: Doomsday (2026) de Marvel Studios (¡Más información sobre este video abajo!).

Avengers: Doomsday marca un punto de inflexión en el universo Marvel, donde una nueva crisis global y multiversal obliga a los héroes más poderosos de la Tierra a librar su batalla más peligrosa hasta la fecha. Con la realidad misma comenzando a fracturarse, la aparición del Doctor Doom introduce una amenaza definida por la inteligencia, la precisión y la ambición absoluta. El tráiler establece un tono más oscuro, mostrando destrucción a gran escala, mundos que colapsan y héroes luchando por mantener el control en un entorno cada vez más inestable. A medida que personajes nuevos y conocidos se unen, la línea entre la supervivencia y la derrota se vuelve más delgada que nunca.

La historia explora un futuro donde el poder por sí solo podría no ser suficiente para detener lo que se avecina, ya que la influencia de Doom se extiende a través de la estrategia, la tecnología y la manipulación en múltiples realidades. Los Vengadores deben enfrentarse no solo a un poderoso enemigo, sino también a las consecuencias de un universo ya llevado al límite. Las alianzas se ponen a prueba, el liderazgo se ve desafiado y cada decisión tiene repercusiones que trascienden una sola línea temporal. Con secuencias de acción épicas, una gran carga emocional y un fuerte potencial para crossovers, Avengers: Doomsday se erige como uno de los proyectos más ambiciosos de Marvel, centrado en el colapso, la resistencia y la lucha por proteger el futuro del multiverso.

Edición, efectos visuales, efectos de sonido y miniatura por @GalacticTrailerOfficial

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Software que utilizo: Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Unreal Engine 5.5
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

◁ En nuestro canal, creamos mashups de tráileres. ▷ Los mashups de tráileres, también conocidos como tráileres reeditados, se crean recopilando fragmentos de varias películas y reeditándolos para formar un tráiler completamente nuevo. Estos montajes suelen representar una película inexistente o cambiar el género de una película ya existente. Como obras derivadas, según lo define la Ley de Derechos de Autor de los Estados Unidos (17 U.S.C. § 101), pueden estar protegidos contra reclamaciones de derechos de autor bajo la doctrina del uso legítimo.

Los montajes de tráileres no solo son una forma de creatividad digital generada por el usuario, sino también una manera única de generar expectación por los próximos estrenos, complementando los tráileres oficiales. Mientras que los tráileres tradicionales anticipan la trama y generan expectación, los montajes creados por fans permiten al público darle su propio toque cinematográfico a las imágenes existentes. Esta libertad creativa puede destacar a un actor en particular, enfatizar una trama específica o incluso transformar por completo el género de la película.

Este video es una parodia. Debido a su naturaleza derivada y transformadora, está protegido por el uso legítimo.

snippet.title: Raja Shivaji Anthem ‘Chhatrapati’ | Marathi | Riteish D | Ajay – Atul | In Cinemas 1 May
snippet.description:
छत्रपती शिवाजी महाराजांची सिंहगर्जना घुमणार... हिंदवी स्वराज्यासाठी, रयतेसाठी आणि मराठी मातीसाठी! 🚩🔥

अजय-अतुल आपल्या सुरांनी सजवणार छत्रपती शिवाजी महाराजांचा पराक्रम! 🔥

सादर करीत आहोत, राजा शिवाजी अँथम 'छत्रपती' 🚩

संगीत: अजय-अतुल
नृत्य-दिग्दर्शक: रेमो डिसूझा

‘हिंदवी स्वराज्याचे शिल्पकार‘ 🚩

‘राजा शिवाजी’
१ मे २०२६ पासून चित्रपटगृहात प्रदर्शित!
मराठी, हिंदी आणि तेलुगू

Jio Studios Presents
A Mumbai Film Company Production
Raja Shivaji
Directed By: Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh
Produced By: Jyoti Deshpande 
Produced By: Genelia Deshmukh
Music Composed, Arranged, Conducted, Produced By: Ajay – Atul
Choreographer: Remo D’Souza
Cinematographer: Santosh Sivan (ASC, ISC)

 A Jio Studios Release

Marathi Lyrics: Ajay-Atul 
Singer: Ajay Gogavale
Song recorded and mixed by Vijay Dayal at YRF Studios
Song Mastered By: Donal Whelan at Hafod Mastering, UK
Recording Engineers at YRF Studio: Abhishek Khandelwal, Sagar Sathe, Dileep Nair
Strings and Brass: Budapest Scoring Orchestra, Hungary
Choreography Team: Yusuf K Khan, Lipsa Acharya, Paul Marshal Cardoz, Vartika Jha, Vaibhav Ghuge, Ashutosh Santosh Pawar, Swapnil Mandavkar
Dancers By: Riaarna Entertainment

Indian Percussion: Satyajit Jamsandekar, Prabhakar Mosamkar, Ratnadeep Jamsandekar, Omkar Ingawale, Raju Kulkarni, Varad Kulkarni, Ganesh Thorat, Sachin Bhangre, Shashank Hadkar, Runal Sawant, Nibban Lokhande, Vishal Sutar, Sandesh Kadam, Tejas Satardekar, Prasad Mayekar, Prashant More, Vijay Jadhav, Sachin Sawant, Keyur Barve, Ashish Aroskar
Chorus (Male): Umesh Joshi, Vijay Dhuri, Shripad Lele, Janardan Dhatrak, Jitendra Tupe, Swapnil Godbole, Vivek Naik, Devendra Chitnis, Siddhant Karawde, Chaitanya Shinde, Karan Kagle, Santosh Bote, Saurabh Wakhare, Yash Kulkarni, Yashad Ghanekar, Kishor Mohite, Latesh Puujari, Mandar Pilwalkar, Abhishek Marotkar, Jagdish Chavan, Jaydeep Bagwadkar, Kaivalya Kejkar, Nachiket Desai, Nitin Ugalmugale, Padmanabh Gaikwad, Pratik Solse, Saghher Mhatrey, Shrirang Bhave, Gaurav Dandekar, Ameya Paranajape, Mangesh Shirke, Nitin Karandikar, Mohan Morajkar, Prasad Manjrekar, Shashank Mohite, Unmesh Chandawarkar, Mohan Shravan, Shishir Saple, Yugandhar Deshmukh, Adyot Saigaonkar, Amar More, Amar Tupe, Amit Dandekar, Aniket Ghaytadke, Anurag Patil, Aryaman Chitnis, Harshavardhan Gore, Kartik Lele, Kaustubh Patil, Nishad Joshi, Pratap Kalke, Rakesh Naik, Ram More, Rishikesh Patil, Sagar Kudalkar, Shardul Kavthekar, Shardul Naik, Shubham Wakhare, Vaibhav Sutar, Vishal Jagtap
Chorus (Female): Pragati Joshi, Arohi Mhatre, Aditi Prabhudesai, Madhura Paranjape, Chaandni RMW, Apurva Nishad, Radhika Bhide, Nidhi Hegde, Shailey Bidwaikar. Sharmishtha Bhatkar. Shruti Bujarbaruah 

“Budapest Scoring Orchestra”
Recording Studio: Rottenbiller Studios
Conductor: Péter Illényi
Session Producer: Bálint Sapszon
Orchestra Indian Representative: Balasubramanian G
Recording Engineer: Dénes Rédly
Studio Assistant: Levente Böde
Librarian: Kati Réti
Orchestrators: Abishek V, Balasubramanian G, Sanjay RA

Story Screenplay: Ajit Wadikar, Sandeep Patil, Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh
Dialogue Writer: Prajakt Deshmukh
Additional Hindi Dialogues: Jaideep Yadav
Editor: Urvashi Saxena
Background Score: John Stewart Eduri
Production Designer: Nikhil Kovale, Apurva Bhagat, Shashank Tere
Associate Producer: Nandita Sachdev
Executive Producer: Sandeep Patil
Casting Director: Rohan Mapuskar
Sound Designer: Kunal & Parikshit
Primary Costume Designer: Rushi Sharma & Manoshi Nath
Secondary Costume Designer: Pournima Oak
Additional Wardrobe / Styling: Nafs [Rizwan Shaikh & Deeksha Sharma Khan]
Action Director: Dawid Szatarski & Manohar Verma
Hair-Makeup Designer: Audrey Sangma, Nitin Indulkar, Hakim Aalim & Kanta Motwani
Chief Assistant Director: Charul Patil
Director’s Assistant: Chandni Kargathra
Research Consultant: Ketan Puri
CG & VFX: Assemblage Entertainment
VFX Head of Production: Swapnil Khotkar
VFX Supervisor: Pushpendra Dubey & Swapnil Ambre
Di Studio: Prime Focus Limited
Di Colorist: Ashirwad Hadkar
Post Producer: Takshit Pradhan
Visual Promotion: Just Right Studioz NX

Jio Studios Team
COO & CFO: Priyanka Chaudhary 
CEO Production & Distribution: Deepak Sharma
Head – Marathi Content: Nikhil Sane 
Chief Legal Officer: Dipti Kotak
PR Head: Amita Naidu
   
Raja Shivaji, based on the life of India’s Greatest Warrior King – Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj, who rose against formidable powers to lay the foundation of Swarajya. Experience this grand historical spectacle on the big screen, unfolding in Marathi & Hindi
 
In Cinemas 1st May 2026

#RajaShivajiAnthemChhatrapati #RiteishDeshmukh #SanjayDutt, #AbhishekBachchan, #VidyaBalan, #SachinKhedekar, #Bhagyashree, #FardeenKhan, #JitendraJoshi, #AmoleGupte, #BomanIrani, #JyotiDeshpande, #GeneliaDeshmukh, #AjayAtul #RemoDsouza

snippet.title: VARAVU - Teaser | Joju George | Arjun Ashokan | Shaji Kailas | Olga Productions
snippet.description:
Presenting the official teaser of Varavu, featuring Joju George, Arjun Ashokan, Saniya Iyappan, Murali Gopi, Baiju Santhosh, Baburaj, Vani Vishwanath, and more. The film is produced by Naisy Reji under the banner of Olga Productions, directed by Shaji Kailas, with music composed by Sam CS.

Directed by : Shaji Kailas
Banner : Olga Productions
Produced by : Naisy Reji
Starring : Joju George, Arjun Ashokan, Murali Gopi, Baiju Santhosh, Baburaj, Vani Vishwanath
Music & Background score : Sam CS
Dialogues : A K Sajan
DOP : S Saravanan
Editor : Shameer Muhammed
Stunts : Stunt Silva, Kalai Kingson, Phoenix Prabu, Rajashekar Master, Thavasi Raj, Mafia Sasi, Jackie Johnson
Executive Producer : Jomy Joseph, Rahul Reji Thomas
Head of Production : Ron Issac Thomas
Production Controller : Vinod Mangalath
Chief Associate : Syamanthak Pradeep
Audiography : Rajakrishnan MR
Sound Design: Rajakrishnan MR
Costume : Sameera Saneesh
Makeup: Saji Kattakada
Lyricist : Vinayak Sasikumar, Harinarayanan, Santhosh varma
Still photography : Hari Thirumala
Choreography : Rekha Master 
VFX : Pictorial FX, Dotvfxstudios
Colourist : Liju Prabhakar
PRO : Manju Gopinath, Hains
Media Communication : Aparna Girish

snippet.title: Kasht (Official Video) Amanraj Gill | Preeti Choudhary | New Haryanvi Song 2026
snippet.description:
Kasht (Official Video) Amanraj Gill | Preeti Choudhary | New Haryanvi Song 2026

Dollar Music presents new haryanvi song KASHT by Amanraj Gill & Preeti Choudhary. Lyrics penned by Amanraj Gill, Music given by Amanraj Gill & AJ Fakira. Video by Talha.


Song : KASHT
Singer : Amanraj Gill, Preeti Choudhary 
Lyrics / Composer : Amanraj Gill
Music : Amanraj Gill, AJ Fakira
Director : Talha 
DOP : Michael Richard Johnson 
Edit/Di: Inkblaze Studios
Line Production : Ten Plus One UK Productions Limited - Dhadda Motion Pictures
Line Producer : Mandeel Hundal 
Line Manager : Ayush Singh
Costume Stylist : Mandy Bains 
MUA : Jind Kaur
Barber/Hairdresser : Jaffrey
Gaffer : Caleb Gregory
Production Assistants : Satinder Singh, Dharmendra Chaudhary
BTS/Stills : Ajay Dhiman
Producer : Nvii Chhaniwala, Kapil Arora
Label : Dollar Music
Online Promotions : GEET DIGITALS (9053553351)
Reels Promotion : Reels Factory (82220 65686)

Lyrics : 
Seedhe muh na baat kre
Tere sare ulte shonk re,
Mhare saare woi kaam re jinpe Sarkara ki rok re,
O mhare bair bandhe jit jaan
R chaati kar deya roshandaan
Chote pad jaa se shamshaan
ye manas balte konya rey,
Na Chadte Hathyara pe dust
rr jisne keh gi dedya kasht
Chale Laake mode brust
Ye chore Talte Konya Re

Khule rakhe haatha ne
Thodi jod lia kar Maya ne,
Koi sedhe j tu bta diye
uki daab dewege kaaya ne,
Klla chora ghar ne
Amane sochke dhar le paaya ne,
jinhe jaame poot daler
Na darr hoya karta un maayan ne,
Gundeya ne dewe panah tu
Karta konya kaam bhala tu
dewe sari galat salah
tham darte konya re,
Na Chadte Hathyara pe dust
rr jisne keh gi dedya kasht
re Chale Laake mode brust
Ye chore Talte Konya Re

Apa baat gehri aale
Phone Blackberry aale
Kaam 18 Tyrei aale
Back sandh carry aale
Yaari raakhde purani
Roj naye bairi aale
Lo jo marji tu shaant
Weapona ki dairy aale
Apa shod deya jo teer
Konya chukte nishane
Leke bandya ki firoti
Dewa plot ke byaane
Kde yes kde no
Re tu laawe gi bahane
Mhare roj ki diwali
Roj aawe se re taane
Jaawe sir te ke baat
mhari paar ambra te
Baaje 1 bje phone
+1 aale numbra te
Fikar na kre
January chahe Decembra te
Dharte na paa chore
Tale defendra te

Samzu m b sari
kyu teri gel fire yo mohalla re,
Ferke chaa me aangli 
Chaa ki bna deya Coka Cola re,
Choti Umre thik nhi
Yo nature tera shoo la re,
Mhare kaale ghode Roada upar
Maarte Chale Jhola re,
Chaaro konya me mhari ghar ki
Miljya Weapon russian turkey
sabki bna dewege firki
faltu jarte konya rey,
Na Chadte Hathyara pe dust
rr jisne keh gi dedya kasht
Chale Laake mode brust
Ye chore Talte Konya Re

O mhare bair bandhe jit jaan
R chaati kar deya roshandaan
Chote pad jaa se shamshaan
ye manas balte konya rey,
Na Chadte Hathyara pe dust
rr jisne keh gi dedya kasht
Chale Laake mode brust
Ye chore Talte Konya Re

Khule rakhe haatha ne
Thodi jod lia kar Maya ne,
Koi sedhe j tu bta diye
uki daab dewege kaaya ne,
Klla chora ghar ne
Amane sochke dhar le paaya ne,
jinhe jaame poot daler
Na darr hoya karta un maayan ne,
Gundeya ne dewe panah tu
Karta konya kaam bhala tu
dewe sari galat salah
tham darte konya re,
Na Chadte Hathyara pe dust
rr jisne keh gi dedya kasht
re Chale Laake mode brust
Ye chore Talte Konya Re

Apa baat gehri aale
Phone Blackberry aale
Kaam 18 Tyrei aale
Back sandh carry aale
Yaari raakhde purani
Roj naye bairi aale
Lo jo marji tu shaant
Weapona ki dairy aale
Apa shod deya jo teer
Konya chukte nishane
Leke bandya ki firoti
Dewa plot ke byaane
Kde yes kde no
Re tu laawe gi bahane
Mhare roj ki diwali
Roj aawe se re taane
Jaawe sir te ke baat
mhari paar ambra te
Baaje 1 bje phone
+1 aale numbra te
Fikar na kre
January chahe Decembra te
Dharte na paa chore
Tale defendra te

Samzu m b sari
kyu teri gel fire yo mohalla re,
Ferke chaa me aangli 
Chaa ki bna deya Coka Cola re,
Choti Umre thik nhi
Yo nature tera shoo la re,
Mhare kaale ghode Roada upar
Maarte Chale Jhola re,
Chaaro konya me mhari ghar ki
Miljya Weapon russian turkey
sabki bna dewege firki
faltu jarte konya rey,
Na Chadte Hathyara pe dust
rr jisne keh gi dedya kasht
Chale Laake mode brust
Ye chore Talte Konya Re


#kasht #amanrajgill #preetichoudhary #newharyanvisong2026 #newharyanvisong #haryanvi #haryanvisong #haryanvisongs #dollarmusic

snippet.title: Krishnavataram vs Ramayana Trailer REVIEW | Deeksha Sharma
snippet.description:
Krishnavataram vs Ramayana Trailer Review By Deeksha Sharma. Krishnavataram Part 1: The Heart (Hridayam) Trailer shocked everyone with Mahabharata Presentation & Larger Than Life Vision with Unexpected Emotional Pull & Fresh Face actors which directly challenge Ramayana Ranbir Kapoor & Yash Namit Malhotra Movie Teaser. Starring Siddharth Gupta as Krishna & Sushmitha Bhat as Radha Krishnavataram is Directed by Hardik Gajjar. snippet.description:

Directed by Petra Collins
Shot in The Palace of Versailles

Follow Olivia Rodrigo:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/oliviarodrigo
Twitter: https://x.com/oliviarodrigo
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@livbedumb
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCy3zgWom-5AGypGX_FVTKpg

Discord: https://discord.com/invite/livieshq

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/chateauversailles/
Twitter: https://x.com/CVersailles
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@chateauversailles
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/chateauversailles
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/chateauversailles


Lyrics

I know that the bar closes at 11
I hope you never finish that beer
You know all the words to “Just Like Heaven”
And I know why he wrote them
Now that you’re standing right here

Ohh
One night I was bored in bed
And stalked you on the internet
It’s feminine intuition
‘Cuz I always had a vision of us standing like this
All pressed up in the bathroom line
You’re looking like an angel on the walls of Versailles
The most alive I’ve ever been
But kiss me and I might drop dead

And I feel like I might throw up
Left hook, right punch to the gut
You’re so so pretty boy
I’m paranoid I made you up
Yeah I’d love it if you walked me home
If you promised we could go real slow
‘Cuz I got chewing gum
And a bunch of stuff I’d like to know
Like, have you ever been to Japan?
Or taken that Eurostar to France?
I’ve been dropping hints all night
That I’d love it if you held my hand, goddamn
And then maybe we could make-makeout
Clothes off and fall to the ground
Let’s go steady
Let’s go out
And tell the whole damn world how

One night I was bored in bed
And stalked you on the internet
It’s feminine intuition
‘Cuz I always had a vision of us standing like this
All pressed up in the bathroom line
You’re looking like an angel on the walls of Versailles
The most alive I’ve ever been
But kiss me and I might

Pisces and a Gemini
But I think we might go really nice together
If you let me stay the night
Well I think I might just have to stay forever

Pisces and a Gemini
But I think we might go really nice together
If you let me stay the night
Well I think I might just have to stay forever

Ohh
One night I was bored in bed
And stalked you on the internet
It’s feminine intuition
‘Cuz I always had a vision of us standing like this
All pressed up in the bathroom line
You’re looking like an angel on the walls of Versailles
The most alive I’ve ever been
But kiss me and I might
Kiss me and I might
Kiss me and I might drop dead

hi.title: ओलिविया रोड्रिगो - ड्रॉप डेड (आधिकारिक संगीत वीडियो)
hi.description:
"ड्रॉप डेड" अब उपलब्ध है: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/dropdead

'यू सीम प्रीटी सैड फॉर अ गर्ल सो इन लव' 12 जून को रिलीज़ हो रही है, इसे अभी से प्री-सेव करें: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/girlsoinlove
कलेक्शन खरीदें: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/store

पेट्रा कॉलिन्स द्वारा निर्देशित
वर्साय पैलेस में फिल्माया गया

ओलिविया रोड्रिगो को फॉलो करें:
इंस्टाग्राम: https://www.instagram.com/oliviarodrigo
ट्विटर: https://x.com/oliviarodrigo
टिकटॉक: https://www.tiktok.com/@livbedumb
यूट्यूब: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCy3zgWom-5AGypGX_FVTKpg
फेसबुक: https://www.facebook.com/OliviaRodrigoOfficial/
डिस्कॉर्ड: https://discord.com/invite/livieshq

वर्साय पैलेस को फॉलो करें:
इंस्टाग्राम: https://www.instagram.com/chateauversailles/
ट्विटर: https://x.com/CVersailles
टिकटॉक: https://www.tiktok.com/@chateauversailles
यूट्यूब: https://www.youtube.com/chateauversailles
फेसबुक: https://www.facebook.com/chateauversailles

गीत के बोल

मुझे पता है कि बार 11 बजे बंद हो जाता है
मुझे उम्मीद है कि तुम वो बियर कभी खत्म नहीं करोगी
तुम्हें "जस्ट लाइक हेवन" के सारे बोल याद हैं
और मुझे पता है कि उसने ये क्यों लिखे
अब जब तुम यहीं खड़ी हो

ओह
एक रात मैं बिस्तर पर बोर हो रही थी
और मैंने तुम्हें इंटरनेट पर ढूंढा
ये स्त्री की सहज बुद्धि है
क्योंकि मैंने हमेशा हम दोनों को ऐसे खड़े देखा था
बाथरूम की लाइन में एक-दूसरे से सटकर
तुम दीवारों पर किसी फरिश्ते जैसी लग रही हो वर्साय
मैं इतनी ज़िंदादिल कभी नहीं रही
पर मुझे चूम लो तो शायद मैं मर ही जाऊँगी

और मुझे उल्टी आने जैसा लग रहा है
बाएँ हुक, दाएँ मुक्का पेट पर
तुम बहुत ही प्यारे लड़के हो
मुझे डर है कि मैंने तुम्हें सिर्फ़ कल्पना में ही देखा है
हाँ, मुझे बहुत अच्छा लगेगा अगर तुम मुझे घर तक छोड़ दो
अगर तुम वादा करो कि हम धीरे-धीरे चलेंगे
क्योंकि मेरे पास च्युइंग गम है
और बहुत सी बातें हैं जो मैं जानना चाहती हूँ
जैसे, क्या तुम कभी जापान गए हो?

या यूरोस्टार से फ़्रांस गए हो?

मैं पूरी रात इशारे करती रही
कि अगर तुम मेरा हाथ पकड़ लो तो मुझे कितना अच्छा लगेगा, धिक्कार है!
और फिर शायद हम किस कर लें
कपड़े उतारकर ज़मीन पर गिर पड़ें
चलो रिश्ता पक्का करते हैं
चलो बाहर चलते हैं
और पूरी दुनिया को बताते हैं कैसे

एक रात मैं बिस्तर पर ऊब गई थी
और इंटरनेट पर तुम्हारा पीछा किया
यह स्त्री की सहज बुद्धि है
क्योंकि मैंने हमेशा हम दोनों को ऐसे खड़े देखा है
बाथरूम की लाइन में एक-दूसरे से चिपके हुए
तुम वर्साय की दीवारों पर किसी देवदूत की तरह लग रहे हो
मैं इतनी ज़िंदादिल कभी नहीं रही
लेकिन मुझे किस करो और शायद मैं

मीन और मिथुन
लेकिन मुझे लगता है कि हम दोनों साथ में बहुत अच्छे लगेंगे
अगर तुम मुझे रात भर रुकने दो
तो मुझे लगता है कि मुझे हमेशा के लिए यहीं रहना पड़ेगा

मीन और मिथुन
लेकिन मुझे लगता है कि हम दोनों साथ में बहुत अच्छे लगेंगे
अगर तुम मुझे रात भर रुकने दो
तो मुझे लगता है कि मुझे हमेशा के लिए यहीं रहना पड़ेगा

ओह
एक रात मैं बिस्तर पर ऊब गई थी
और इंटरनेट पर तुम्हारा पीछा किया
यह स्त्री की सहज बुद्धि है अंतर्ज्ञान
क्योंकि मैंने हमेशा से हम दोनों को इस तरह खड़े देखने का सपना देखा था
बाथरूम की लाइन में एक-दूसरे से सटकर खड़े

Ich hoffe, du trinkst dein Bier nie aus.

Es ist weibliche Intuition.

Una noche estaba aburrida en la cama
Y te busqué en internet
Es intuición femenina
Porque siempre me imaginé que estaríamos así
Todos apretujados en la fila del baño
Pareces un ángel en las paredes de Versalles
Nunca me había sentido tan viva
Pero bésame y podría morirme

Y siento que voy a vomitar
Gancho de izquierda, puñetazo de derecha al estómago
Eres tan, tan guapo
Me da miedo haberte inventado
Sí, me encantaría que me acompañaras a casa
Si me prometieras que iríamos despacio
Porque tengo chicle
Y un montón de cosas que me gustaría saber
Como, ¿alguna vez has estado en Japón?

¿O has viajado en el Eurostar a Francia?
He estado lanzando indirectas toda la noche
De que me encantaría que me tomaras de la mano, maldita sea
Y luego tal vez podríamos besarnos apasionadamente
Quitarnos la ropa y caer al suelo
Seamos novios
Salgamos
Y contémosle al mundo entero cómo

Una noche estaba aburrida en la cama
Y te busqué en internet
Es intuición femenina
Porque siempre me imaginé que estaríamos así
Todos apretujados en la fila del baño
Te ves como un ángel en las murallas de Versalles
Nunca me había sentido tan viva
Pero bésame y tal vez

Piscis y Géminis
Pero creo que haríamos muy buena pareja
Si me dejas quedarme a pasar la noche
Bueno, creo que tendré que quedarme para siempre

Piscis y Géminis
Pero creo que haríamos muy buena pareja
Si me dejas quedarme a pasar la noche
Bueno, creo que tendré que quedarme para siempre

Ohh
Una noche estaba aburrida en la cama
Y te busqué en internet Internet
Es intuición femenina
Porque siempre me imaginé así, apretujadas en la fila del baño
Pareces un ángel en las murallas de Versalles
Nunca me había sentido tan viva
Pero bésame y podría
Bésame y podría
Bésame y podría morir

A heart-touching, fun-filled middle-class husband and wife love story is here! ❤️
Savings Mogudu Sokula Pellam brings you emotions, comedy, and relatable moments from everyday married life that every Telugu audience will connect with.

Get ready for a rollercoaster of love, savings struggles, cute fights, and realistic family drama — all packed into one entertaining web series! 🎬

snippet.title: সপ্তডিঙার গুপ্তধন(Saptadingar Guptodhon) |Teaser| Abir | Arjun | Ishaa | Dhrubo B | 15th May | SVF
snippet.description:
সপ্তডিঙায় শোরগোল!
গুপ্তধনের সন্ধানে সোনাদা ফিরছে সদলবল!
দুর্গেশগড় থেকে কর্ণসুবর্ণে করে গুপ্তধনের সন্ধান…
ফিরছে সোনাদা-আবির-ঝিনুক নিয়ে নতুন treasure hunt! 

Sonada is back with Abir and Jhinuk in search of another hidden treasure!
Presenting the official teaser of #SaptadingarGuptodhon
A film directed by Dhrubo Banerjee, in cinemas 15th May.

Bookmyshow : https://in.bookmyshow.com/movies/kolkata/saptadingar-guptodhon/ET00438069

Credits : 

Presented By - Shrikant Mohta, Mahendra Soni
Production - Follow Focus Films
Director - Dhrubo Banerjee
Cast- Abir Chatterjee, Arjun Chakrabarty, Ishaa Saha, Kaushik Ganguly
Co-Producers - Vishnu Mohta, Rahul Mohta
Associate Producer - Abhishek Daga
Story & Screenplay - Dhrubo Banerjee, Sugata Guha
Dialogues - Sugata Guha
Music - Indraadip Dasgupta
DOP - Soumik Haldar (ISC)
Editor - Sanglap Bhowmik
Production Design - Shibaji Pal, Bablu Singha
Costume Design - Sanchita Pal Chakraborty
Makeup - Abhijit Das
Production Head - Subhadeep Ghosh
Executive Producers - Asim Kumar Ghosh, Anurag Pati
Production Manager - Sujay Kotal
Associate Directors - Joy Mukherjee, Ishani Mishra
DI Colorist - Debojyoti Ghosh (Edit FX)
Sound Design - Adeep Singh Manki
Sound Mix - Anindit Roy (CAS)
VFX Studios - SVF Studios, Fourth Dimension Visual Effects
Publicity Design - Anonymous
Promo Design - Pratik Banerjee,
Mandar Banerjee

snippet.title: GODZILLA MINUS ZERO | First Look Teaser
snippet.description:
GODZILLA MINUS ZERO
VFX, Written, and Directed by Takashi Yamazaki
In theatres November 6
Follow @godzilla_toho and @GKIDSfilms for more updates!
godzillaminuszero.com

GODZILLA MINUS ZERO picks up in 1949, two years after the tumultuous events of Godzilla Minus One, and continues the story of the Shikishima family as they face an all-new calamity. Additionally confirmed out of CinemaCon, Ryunosuke Kamiki, the hero who faced Godzilla’s terror in Godzilla Minus One, returns as Koichi Shikishima, and is joined by Minami Hamabe as Noriko Oishi, who miraculously survived Godzilla’s first attack on Tokyo.

As a project Filmed For IMAX, GODZILLA MINUS ZERO was shot with high-definition digital cameras certified by IMAX, and optimized in sound and imagery unique to IMAX screens. Fans can look forward to seeing Godzilla presented to all new terrifying heights, making GODZILLA MINUS ZERO in a true cinematic event not to be missed.

Godzilla Store: https://godzilla.com/collections/all

For more information regarding Godzilla, check out our other channels:

Godzilla News: 
https://godzilla.com/blogs/news 

Instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/godzilla_toho/ 

X:
https://twitter.com/Godzilla_Toho

Facebook: 
https://www.facebook.com/tohogodzillaofficial/ 

TikTok:
https://www.tiktok.com/@tohogodzillaofficial

=====

snippet.title: Hushar Pittalu - Release Trailer Out Now | Vasavi Ganeshan | Ansh | Bikshu |K. Venkat Yadav | MBS
snippet.description:
Hushar Pittalu - Release Trailer Out Now | Vasavi Ganeshan | Ansh | Bikshu |K. Venkat Yadav |MBS
Watch -- Hushar Pittalu Teaser on Suresh Productions.

Hushar Pittalu is an Upcoming Movie Starring Vasavi Ganeshan & Ansh and Others. Written & Directed by Bikshu. Music by Charan Arjun. Produced by K. Venkat Yadav. Under - Rudra Kranthi  Pictures.

Cast & Crew Details :

Cast : Vasavi Ganeshan, Ansh, Govardhan, Sunitha Manohar, Ramesh, Anji Valguman.

Technical Crew  : 

Director : Bikshu
Producer : K. Venkat Yadav
Music : Charan Arjun
Editor : Marthand K Venkatesh
Cinematography : Rudra Sai
Written by : Bikshu
Art Director : Gade Siva Kumar
Lyrisist : S.S Chiranjan
DI : B2H Studio
Colorist : P. Venkat
Dolby Atmos : Devi Krishna Kadiyala (Ramanaidu Studios)
Asst Editor : Ganesh Komarapu
Promo Cuts : Konjarla Lohith
Sound Design  : Purushotham Raju
PRO : Madhuri Madhu
Digital : Warey Media
Designs : Mayabazar 
Present : Padmamma, B.V.G Studios
Banner : Rudra Kranthi  Pictures
Release : Asian Suresh Entertainment.

#HusharPittalu​  #HusharPittaluTeaser​  #VasaviGaneshan​ #Ansh​ #Bikshu​ #CharanArjun​ #RudraKranthiPictures​ #AsianSureshEntertainment​ #LatestTeluguMovies​ #TeluguTeasers2026​ #LatestTeluguTeasers​ 
---------------------------

Suresh Productions (Telugu: సురేష్ ప్రొడక్షన్స్) is a film production company, a subsidiary of Rama Naidu Studios, founded by Dr. D. Ramanaidu. The production house of the company is Ramanaidu Studios which is located at Hyderabad. Suresh Productions, is one of India’s largest film production companies with over 50 years of contribution to national and regional cinema.

snippet.title: Pitt Siyapa (Official Trailer) | Sonam Bajwa | Paramvir Singh Cheema | New Punjabi Movie | 1st May
snippet.description:
Laughter, drama & total siyapa begins !

Watch the Official Movie Trailer of "Pitt Siyapa", Latest Punjabi Movie 2026 starring Sonam Bajwa & Paramvir Singh Cheema.

Releasing worldwide in cinemas on 1st May 2026

Subscribe:  https://www.youtube.com/@UCuFwzKrS0wE43CSkyaHBGiQ 

➤Follow SagaHits on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/sagahits

snippet.title: Arvind Akela Kallu New Song | Sughar Sughar Mall Bhauji | Priya Raghuvanshi | New Bhojpuri Song 2026
snippet.description:
Presenting the latest Bhojpuri song “Sughar Sughar Mall Bhauji”, featuring Arvind Akela Kallu & Priya Raghuvanshi. Sung by Arvind Akela Kallu, this entertaining track is packed with catchy beats and desi swag.

Subscribe to our channel for more Bhojpuri Songs:
https://youtube.com/c/SaregamaHumBhojpuri

Credits
Album Name - Sughar Sughar Mall Bhauji 
Singer - Arvind Akela Kallu
Featuring - Priya Raghuvanshi
Music - Priyanshu Singh
Lyrics - Ashutosh Tiwari 
Director & Choreographer - Raunak Raut
Dop - Rahul Yadav 
Edit - Rohan
Di - Rohit Singh
Makeup - Shibu and Rajesh

Lyrics 

मुखड़ा
साच कहींई हम नईहर में ताहरा( भाभी जी  सुनिए ना) सच कहींई हम नईहर में ताहरा 
गजब गजब बाड़ी माल भौजी 2
(यह हो) पान के  जैसन पातर कमरिया 2
सेव नियन  लाल गाल भौजी
गजब गजब बाड़ी माल भौजी 

अंतरा,1
मन बा जाई भैया के ससुरारी साली के सूरत लागेला बाड़ी प्यारी लागेला बड़ी प्यारी (ए भौजी) 
बड़की से छोटा की सुनर बिया 
नाइकि मॉडाल  फॉर्च्यूनर बिया
बिना बरक ऑस्किलेटर दब वाले 
गजबे के धारेले चल भौजी
सुघर सुघर बाड़ी माल भौजी 

अंतर ,2
चढ़ल जवानी में कारीले वेटी 
भाभी हमार कर देना सेटिंग कर देना सेटिंग
(प्लीज भाभी) असावे लग्न में बाजा बाजी
देहिया पे हरदी ताजा लागी
कल्लू जी अंगना में ढोलक बजाई है 
आशु प्रियांशु जी झाल भौजी 
सुघर सुघर बाड़ी माल भौजी

#SugharSugharMallBhauji
#ArvindAkelaKallu
#BhojpuriSong
#NewBhojpuriSong
#BhojpuriGana
#PriyaRaghuvanshi
#SaregamaHumBhojpuri
#BhojpuriHitSong
#TrendingSong
#BhojpuriVideo

snippet.title: Madhuvidhu Trailer | Ajith Vinayaka Films | Vishnu Aravind | Sharaf U Dheen | Kalyani Panicker
snippet.description:
Presenting the trailer Of Madhuvidhu (Malayalam) in Theaters 23rd April 2026.
Directed by Vishnu Aravind, The film stars Sharaf U Dheen & Kalyani Panicker In lead roles, with Music Composed by Hesham Abdul Wahab. 
It Is Produced by Vinayaka Ajith under the Banner of Ajith Vinayaka Films. 
In association with Babu Ettan Films.

Cast:
Sharaf U Dheen
Kalyani Panicker
Jagadhish
Azeez Nedumangadu
Saikumar
Sreejaya
Amal Jose
Sanju Madhu

Banner : Ajith Vinayaka Films
Producer : Vinayaka Ajith
Director : Vishnu Aravind
Co Producers : Santhakumar, Malavika Krishnadas
Story, Screenplay & Dialogue : Bibin Mohan - Jai Vishnu

A Hesham Abdul Wahab Musical
Project Designer : Ranjith Karunakaran
Cinematographer : Viswajith Odukkathil
Additional Cinematographer :  Faiz Siddik
Editor & Post Production Supervisor : Christy Sebastian
Art Director : Ouseph John
Costume Designer : Divya George
Make Up : Jithesh Poyya
Audiography : Vishnu PC
Lyricists : Suhail Koya, Arun Alat, Bk Harinarayanan
Production Controller : Sajeev Chandiroor

snippet.title: Focker-In-Law | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
The circle of trust just got bigger. Focker-In-Law is in theaters this Thanksgiving. 
 ______  

This November, comedy icon and Emmy winner Ben Stiller and two-time Oscar® winner Robert De Niro reunite, joined by Grammy winner and Oscar® nominee Ariana Grande, in Focker-In-Law, a new chapter in the blockbuster Meet the Parents franchise.
 
Written and directed by John Hamburg, who co-wrote the three previous Meet the Parents films, Focker-In-Law is produced by Oscar® nominee Jane Rosenthal and Robert De Niro for Tribeca Productions; Ben Stiller and Oscar® winner John Lesher for Red Hour Films; Emmy winner Jay Roach for Delirious Media; and John Hamburg for Particular Pictures.


Find Focker-In-Law on Instagram at https://www.instagram.com/fockerinlaw/
Follow Focker-In-Law on Facebook at  https://www.facebook.com/fockerinlaw/
Follow Focker-In-Law on X at https://twitter.com/fockerinlaw
Follow Focker-In-Law on TikTok at https://www.tiktok.com/@fockerinlaw
https://www.fockerinlaw.com 

Genre: Comedy
Cast: Robert De Niro, Ben Stiller, Ariana Grande, Owen Wilson, Blythe Danner, Teri Polo, Skyler Gisondo, Beanie Feldstein, Eduardo Franco
Written and directed by: John Hamburg
Producers:Jane Rosenthal, Robert De Niro, Ben Stiller, John Lesher, Jay Roach, John Hamburg

snippet.title: जाने क्यों लोग मोहब्बत किया | Mehboob Ki Mehndi | Lata Mangeshkar Songs | Leena Chandavarkar
snippet.description:
सुरीली आवाज की मलिका, लता मंगेशकर जी की आवाज़ में डूबे, 'जाने क्यों लोग मोहब्बत किया' सुनिए। 70 के दशक के इस नगमे में प्यार की गहराई और दर्द को महसूस करें। यह गाना हमें मोहब्बत की राहों पर ले जाता है, जहाँ खुशी भी है और गम भी। लता जी की आवाज़ इस गाने को और भी खास बना देती है।



Credits :

Song: Jane Kyon Log Mohabbat Kiya
Album: Mehboob Ki Mehndi
Artist: Lata Mangeshkar
Music Director: Laxmikant-Pyarelal
Lyricist: Anand Bakshi 



Lyrics :

is zamane me, is mohabat ne
kitne dil tode, kitne ghar phunke
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai
dil ke badale darde dil liya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

tanhayi milti hai, mahafil nahi milti
rahe mahobat me kabhi manzil nahi milti
dil tut jata hai, nakam hota hai
ulfat ye logo ka yahi anjam hota hai
koi kya jane, kyu ye parawane,
kyu machalate hai, gum me jalate hai
aahe bhar bhar ke diwane jiya karate hai
aahe bhar bhar ke diwane jiya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

sawan me aankho ko, kitana rulati hai
furasat me jab dil ko kisi ki yaad aati hai
ye zindagi yu hi barabad hoti hai
har waqt hotho pe koi fariyad hoti hai
na dawao ka naam chalata hai
na duao se kam chalata hai
zahar ye phir bhi sabhi kyu piya karate hai
zahar ye phir bhi sabhi kyu piya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

mahabub se har gum manasub hota hai
din rat ulfat me tamasha khub hota hai
rato se bhi lambe ye pyar ke kise
aashiq sunate hai zafa ye yaar ke kise
bemurawat hai, bewafa hai wo,
us sitamagar ka apne dilwar ka,
naam le leke duhayi diya karate hai
naam le leke duhayi diya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

यह गाना आपको कैसा लगा? कमेंट करके बताएं और अपने पसंदीदा गाने भी शेयर करें। हमारे चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करना न भूलें ताकि आप ऐसे ही खूबसूरत नगमों का आनंद लेते रहें।

Let the magic of music live on…

#LataMangeshkar #JaneKyonLogMohabbatKiya #MehboobKiMehndi #HindiSongs #70sMusic #ClassicBollywood #LoveSongs #SentimentalSongs #BollywoodMusic #IndianMusic

snippet.title: BHOLUKA BAAH | ZUBEEN GARG BORNALI KALITTA | OFFICIAL VIDEO| Superhit Assamese Music Video |New Song
snippet.description:
সকলোলৈকে বাপোতি-সাহোন ৰঙালী বিহু আৰু অসমীয়া নৱবৰ্ষৰ হিয়াভৰা ওলগ জনালোঁ।
জুবিন গাৰ্গবিহীন এই বহাগ যেন আধৰুৱা। কুলিৰ মাত শুনিছোঁ, কিন্তু আমাৰ হিয়াৰ আমঠুৰ মাত শুনিবলৈ পোৱা নাই। তেখেতৰ স্মৃতি বুকুত বান্ধি আমাৰ কণ্ঠৰে এটি বিহু গীত আপোনালোকলৈ আগবঢ়ালোঁ। গীতটি পুৰণা হ’লেও তেখেতৰ খুবেই প্ৰিয় আছিল। গীতটোৰ এটি ভিডিঅ’ নিৰ্মাণ কৰাৰ কথা আছিল আৰু জুবিন দাই নিজেও তাত অভিনয় কৰিম বুলি কৈছিল। কিন্তু সময়ৰ নিষ্ঠুৰ পৰিহাসত আজি সেয়া মোৰ বাবে কেৱল এক সপোন হৈয়ে ৰৈ গ’ল।
গীতটি শুনিবচোন।
এই বহাগে আপোনালোকৰ জীৱনলৈ কঢ়িয়াই আনক সুখ, সমৃদ্ধি আৰু অনাবিল আনন্দ। নতুন বছৰটো সকলোৰে বাবে মংগলময় হওক। জুবিন গাৰ্গৰ ন্যায় প্ৰতিষ্ঠা হওক।

Song : Bholuka Baah
Artist : Zuneen Garg / Bornali Kalitta
Music : ApurvaSonit
Mix&Mstrd : Lt. Ashim Das

Audio Platforms:

https://open.spotify.com/track/6sKJo2g83tHa6a81LCHPBv?si=DbWNLgEtQ263rqB1oi5H7A

https://staging.jiosaavn.com/song/bholuka-bahore-gaj/KgYhewdjVks

https://gaana.com/song/bholuka-bahore-gaj

‎Bholuka Bahore Gaj – Song by Zubeen Garg & Bornali Kalita – Apple Music https://share.google/AtYgaeiHcuccxxJeq

জুবিন গাৰ্গবিহীন এই বহাগ যেন আধৰুৱা। কুলিৰ মাত শুনিছোঁ, কিন্তু আমাৰ হিয়াৰ আমঠুৰ মাত শুনিবলৈ পোৱা নাই। তেখেতৰ স্মৃতি বুকুত বান্ধি আমাৰ কণ্ঠৰে এটি বিহু গীত আপোনালোকলৈ আগবঢ়ালোঁ। গীতটি পুৰণা হ’লেও তেখেতৰ খুবেই প্ৰিয় আছিল। গীতটোৰ এটি ভিডিঅ’ নিৰ্মাণ কৰাৰ কথা আছিল আৰু জুবিন দাই নিজেও তাত অভিনয় কৰিম বুলি কৈছিল। কিন্তু সময়ৰ নিষ্ঠুৰ পৰিহাসত আজি সেয়া মোৰ বাবে কেৱল এক সপোন হৈয়ে ৰৈ গ’ল।
গীতটি শুনিবচোন।
এই বহাগে আপোনালোকৰ জীৱনলৈ কঢ়িয়াই আনক সুখ, সমৃদ্ধি আৰু অনাবিল আনন্দ। নতুন বছৰটো সকলোৰে বাবে মংগলময় হওক। জুবিন গাৰ্গৰ ন্যায় প্ৰতিষ্ঠা হওক।

Song : Bholuka Baah
Artist : Zuneen Garg / Bornali Kalitta
Music : ApurvaSonit
Mix&Mstrd : Lt. Ashim Das

Audio Platforms:

https://open.spotify.com/track/6sKJo2g83tHa6a81LCHPBv?si=DbWNLgEtQ263rqB1oi5H7A

https://staging.jiosaavn.com/song/bholuka-bahore-gaj/KgYhewdjVks

https://gaana.com/song/bholuka-bahore-gaj

‎Bholuka Bahore Gaj – Song by Zubeen Garg & Bornali Kalita – Apple Music https://share.google/AtYgaeiHcuccxxJeq

snippet.title: Avengers Doomsday CinemaCon Trailer Leaked 🔥😱
snippet.description:
The first look at Avengers Doomsday has finally arrived from CinemaCon… and it’s absolutely insane 🔥😱

This trailer gives us a glimpse of a massive multiversal war, where the Avengers face their biggest threat yet — Doctor Doom 💀⚡ From epic action sequences to dark and intense moments, everything about this teaser screams next-level Marvel madness.

We’re seeing hints of returning legends, powerful new enemies, and a storyline that could change the entire MCU forever. 👀🔥

Stay tuned, because this might just be the beginning of Marvel’s biggest crossover ever…

#AvengersDoomsday  #doctordoom  #robertdowneyjr  #Marvel #CinemaCon #MCU #DoctorDoom

#hindisong

Warning ⚠️ : Don't Re-Upload My Content On YouTube And Other Platforms.

Phool tumhe bheja hai khat mein | Old Hindi Romantic Song | Heart Touching 60s-70s Vibe Love Song 
Step back into the golden era of Bollywood with “Jis phool tumhe bheja hai khat mein”, a soul-stirring romantic track inspired by the timeless melody style of the 1980s–90s Hindi songs. This beautiful love song captures the essence of old-school romance, soothing vocals, and vintage musical charm that will touch your heart instantly.
Relive the nostalgia of retro Bollywood music with emotional lyrics, classic melodies, and a warm vintage feel  perfect for those who love old Hindi romantic songs and evergreen love stories.


🔗 Credits & Copyright Info:
Song: Phool Tumhe Bheja Hai Khat Mein
Album: Saraswatichandra
Artist: Lata Mangeshkar, Mukesh
Language: Hindi
Mood: Romantic
Director: Govind Saraiya
Star Cast: Nutan, Manish, Sulochana, Vijaya Chowdhury, Ramesh Deo, Seema Deo
Music Director: Kalyanji Anandji
Lyricist: Indeewar

Culture. Strength. Swag.
This is not just a song - it’s a vibe.

Fir se jalwa dikhane

Hum fir aaye scene banane

RR Ki Hai Train

Insaan Insane
Mera Kaam Insane

Mera Pen Mera Pain 
AI Jaisa Brain

Main Well Connected Spiritually
Mainstream Commercial Mein Lyrically

snippet.title: Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe Official Video Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood #hindisong #2026
snippet.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

hi.title: Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe Official Video Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood #hindisong #2026
hi.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

snippet.title: Jignesh Barot | Sacho Prem (Official Video) | સાચો પ્રેમ | New Gujarati Love Song 2026
snippet.description:
જિગ્નેશ બારોટનું દિલને સ્પર્શી જતું ગીત “સાચો પ્રેમ” સાથે અનુભવ કરો સાચા પ્રેમની લાગણી ફક્ત  @SaregamaGujarati  પર.❤️🎶 

Credits:
Title: Sacho Prem
Singer: Jignesh Barot
Producer: Red Velvet Cinema
Music: Jitu Prajapati
Lyrics: Rajan Rayka, Dhaval Motan
Creative Producer: Dhyey Films & Team
Artist: Jignesh Barot, Riya Jaisawal, Diza Sharma, Mitesh Verma
Concept Director: Vishnu Thakor (Adalaj)
Camera & Editing: Montu Rajput
Production: MehulSinh (Nana Vadodara)
Technical Support: Jenish Talaviya
Makeup & Hair: Hashmukh Limbachiya, Lata Patel
Spot Boy: Gado
Light: Kalpesh Jadav
Sound: Sunil Kachhiya
Jignesh Barot Costume: Ekta J Barot
Special Thanks: J D Bapu

Lyrics:
ઓ જેના થી સાચો પ્રેમ થઈ જાય (૨)
જિંદગી ભર એતો યાદ રહી જાય 
દિલ તો દિલ એ લોહી માં ભળી જાય 
જિંદગી ભર એતો યાદ રહી જાય 
ઓ ભગવાન તરફ થી એ ભેટ રે મળેલી
હિમ્મત થી નહીં એ કિસ્મત થી મળેલી 
એ નજર થી એક વાર નજર મળી જાય 
વરસો વર્ષ  સુધી યાદ રહી જાય 
જિંદગી ભર એતો યાદ રહી જાય 
ઓ પાટણ ના પટોળા ને સુરત ની સાડી 
કોડ રહી જા ને બની મારી લાડી 
ઓ એક થાળી માં જમતા પ્રેમ એવો હતો લાગતું બહુ મેથું 
ઓ મારા ફોટા વાળું લાગતા એ વોલપેપર 
હજુ એ ખબર છે એને ભાવતી બહુ વેફર 
ઓ જેના થી સાચો પ્રેમ થઈ જાય 
જિંદગી ભર એતો યાદ રહી જાય (૨)
ઓ આ જીગા અફસોસ થઈ છે વળી વળી 
બધું માળિયું મળી ના મારી વ્હાલી 
ઓ એના વગર દિલ માં મારા કોઈ ના રાખીશ 
એ પાછા આવશે તો જવાબ હું શું આપીશ 
ઓ વાત કરતા કરતા આંખો ભીની થઈ જાય છે 
રૂંધાયેલા ઘાવ ફરી તાજા થઈ જાય છે 
ઓ જેના થી સાચો પ્રેમ થઈ જાય 
જિંદગી ભર એતો યાદ રહી જાય 
વરસો વર્ષ  સુધી યાદ રહી જાય 
જિંદગી ભર એતો યાદ રહી જાય

snippet.title: Spending $8,592,437 To Become The FATTEST In Roblox..
snippet.description:
Today I spent alot of robux so that I can get fat in roblox. Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Merch: https://foltyn.shop/

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn
tags: roblox but every second you get bigger!
foltyn and caylus playing roblox together!
i became the fattest roblox player..

snippet.title: Jinugo Male Official Video Song ❤️ | Dhanush Gowda, Spandana Somanna | Akash Unnikrishnan |PRK Audio
snippet.description:
Unicorn Entertainment in association with PRK Audio proudly presents
Jinugo Male | ಜಿನುಗೊ ಮಳೆ - A Musical Journey
In a quiet rural village, a carefree boy’s life changes when a new teacher arrives at the local school.
The moment he sees her step off the morning bus, he falls in love at first sight.

ಜಿನುಗೊ ಮಳೆ ವಿಡಿಯೋ ಸಾಂಗ್ ಈಗ ನಿಮ್ಮ ಮುಂದೆ...
Presenting the Official music video of Jinugo Male - In a quiet village, a loud heart found its love...
Starring Dhanush Gowda & Spandana Somanna
Directed by Akash Unnikrishnan
