snippet.title: Shilabati | Official Full Video |  New Sambalpuri Song | Jayshree | Alex | Karan| Sanju | Kamalesh
snippet.description:
Shilabati | Official Full Video |  New Sambalpuri Song | Jayshree Sarngi | Alex Bawa | Karan Kumar | Sanju Mohanty | Kamaleshh Chakrabortyy | Dilip Singh |
#shilabati #officialfullvideo #newsambalpurisong #jayshreesarangi #alexbawa #karankumar #sanjumohanty #kamaleshchakraborty #dilipsingh 

🎬Song - Shilabati
🎬Producer - Durgaram Choudhary 
🎬Direction & Choreography - Karan Kumar
🎬Asst Choreographer - Sanju
🎬Starring - Jayshree Sarangi, Alex Bawa & Karan Kumar
🎬Dop/Edit/Di - Appu Behera
🎬Asst DOP - Ritesh 
🎬Traveling - Amulya 
🎬Producution Head - Devit Harry
🎬Production Manager - Shibanand Bhitria
🎬Dance Group - Gurukul Dance Academy
🎬Mackup - Sagar
🎬Costume - BBRS
🎬Light - Rajesh 
🎬Publicity Design - A One Desing
🎬Special Thanks To Manaharpali Bio Fuels Development Foundation

Audio Credit :-
𝅘𝅥𝅯 Singer - Sanju Mohanty 
𝅘𝅥𝅯 Rap & Lyrics - Alex Bawa   
𝅘𝅥𝅯 Music - Kamaleshh Chakrabortyy
𝅘𝅥𝅯 Lyrics - Dilip Singh
𝅘𝅥𝅯 Mpc - Anirudhha Dhala (Babu Da)
𝅘𝅥𝅯 Vst - John Niranjan Pandey
𝅘𝅥𝅯 Rhythm - Nibash Jackson, Pintu Naik, Sunil Bibhar, Kanha
𝅘𝅥𝅯 Mixing & Master - MRR Studio ( MRR.Studio, Cuttack ) 
𝅘𝅥𝅯 Track Recording - RR Studio, Bargarh

🎶𝐒𝐭𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐦 𝓢𝓱𝓲𝓵𝓫𝓪𝓽𝓲 𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐲𝐰𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐞 :
Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/26214778978192194
Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/track/0cqxzUhVbm2a2UadtgAfmS?si=05f9dc2f015f44b3
Gaana - https://gaana.com/song/shilabati-feat-alex-bawa
YouTube Music : https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=qIu2dTgT7j0
JioSaavn :https://www.jiosaavn.com/album/shilabati/vr,-9DF1lCg_
Amazon Music - https://tinyurl.com/2pw465nr
Apple Music : https://music.apple.com/us/album/shilabati-feat-alex-bawa-single/1893058907

Full Song Lyrics :-
DHAGA
A Landar Fandar Panch Pandar
Aage Pachha Fida Bandar
Chere Mera Kecher Kachar
Sabu Jakar Hee... 

MUKHDA
Buli Gale Bajara 
Lachku Thile Kamar
Dhangra Suhla Satara 
Haiya Haiya Haiya Re..... 

Buli Gale Bajara 
Lachku Thile Kamar
Dhangra Suhla Satara 
Haiya Haiya Haiya Re..... 

1st CROSS
Monika Madhuri 
Cinema Bali Turi
Mor Panate Demi Tate Khuchi Re....

MELODY
A Mui Andhare Bijili Bati Re...
Mui Shila Mui Shila 
Mui Shila Rani Shila Bati Re 
Mui Sapane Aayesi Raati Re 
Mui Shila Mui Shila 
Mui Shila Rani Shila Bati Re 

2nd CROSS
Mor Hasi Madhumati 
Risimi Chabiri Chati re 

MELODY
A Mui Andhare Bijili Bati Re...
Mui Shila Mui Shila 
Mui Shila Rani Shila Bati Re 
Mui Sapane Aayesi Raati Re 
Mui Shila Mui Shila 
Mui Shila Rani Shila Bati Re 

RAP part
Malki Malki Anta Dhana Tor 
Chat Patia Katha
Hirni Chali Mann Jaluchhe 
Hei Gali Na Atha
Beni Jhule Laplapa Tor 
Aenkh Bhi Marsi Chot
A Dekh, Bawa Pura Bolangiria 
Udei Deba Tor Hoss

Shila Rani Shila Bati Tui
Dil Cherei Kari 
Muhu Mudi Desu
Anta Halei Kari
Mann Mari Desu
Dekhi Tate Dil Thi Bajsi Gaana 
Gaale Chumi Deti
Lade Gelhe Chahara Diuchhu 
Dhana Rani Shila Bati 
A... Rani Shilabati

1st Antra
Ha.... Ha .. Ha... 
A Mor Mahu Mahulia Ankhi 
Dekhi Tor Rashia Duluke Chhati
Chehera Ukia 
Jhaka Maka Jhala Mala Dibri Bati

Haye Mor Makhmali Gura Dihi
A Guta Chaule Gadhichhe Dihi
Mahani Mantara.... 
Guri Gaale Jhalaa Mala Sundri Kain.. 

Mitha Burolati
Mor Chahani Chandara Bati re

Mui Andhare Bijili Bati Re...
Mui Shila Mui Shila 
Mui Shila Rani Shila Bati Re 
Mui Sapane Aayesi Raati Re 
Mui Shila Mui Shila 
Mui Shila Rani Shila Bati Re 

Chorus
Aahaa Aahaa Aahaa Aahaa Aa...... 

2nd Antra
Haa... Haa... Haa... Ha.....
Haye Mor Kanli Khiali Mana
Juba.... Bayasa Mor Chhana Chhana
Kahari Mahake... 
Pachhe Pachhe Parjapati 
Dhaai Aasena

Please Photu Gute Hema Bali
Emago Pilankar Kete Galahi
Laguchhe Laja Maa... 
Gada Gada Hada Hada 
Dhangra Khali

Sabhe Kahu Achhan
Muin Puara Natural Beauty Re... 

MALE part
A Tui Andhare Bijili Bati Re

Chorus
Tui Shila Ha 
Tui Shila Isss
Tui Shila Rani Shila bati Re

Female
Mui Sapane Aayesi Raati Re 

Chorus
Tui Shila
Tui Shila 
Tui Shila Rani Shilabati Re... 
Hettt....

Movie Credits:
Producer: Subhash Ghai
Director: Subhash Ghai
StarCast: Sanjay Dutt, Jackie Shroff, Madhuri Dixit, Raakhee, Anupam Kher

Song Lyrics:

Ji Haan 
Main Hoon Khal Nayak

Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hai Tu 
Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hai Tu 

Zulmi Bada Dukhdayak Hai Tu
Is Pyaar Ki Tujhko Kya Kadar
Is Pyaar Ke Kahan Layak Hai Tu

Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main 
Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main
Zulmi Bada Dukhdayak Hoon Main
Hai Pyaar Kya Mujhko Kya Khabar
Bas Yaar Nafrat Ke Layak Hoon Main
Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main

Teri Tabiyat Toh Rangeen Hai 
Par Tu Mohabbat Ki Tauheen Hai

Kuch Bhi Nahi Yaad Iske Siwa
Na Main Kisika Na Koi Mera

Karta Main Kya Aur Bas Chheen Li

Bas Chheen Li

Sabko Pata Tha Main Kamzor Hoon
Main Isliye Aaj Kuch Aur Hoon
Kuch Aur Hoon
Kuch Aur Hoon

Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main 
Zulmi Bada Dukhdayak Hoon Main
Hai Pyaar Kya Mujhko Kya Khabar
Bas Yaar Nafrat Ke Layak Hoon Main
Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hai Tu

Kitne Khilono Se Khela Hai Tu 
Afsos Phir Bhi Akela Hai Tu

Bachpan Mein Likhi Kahani Meri
Kaise Badalti Jawani Meri
Saara Samundar Mere Paas Hai
Ek Boond Paani Meri Pyaas Hai
Meri Pyaas Hai
Meri Pyaas Hai
Dekha Tha Maa Ne Kabhi Pyaar Se
Ab Mil Gayi Woh Bhi Sansaar Se
Main Woh Lootera Hoon Jo Lutt Gaya 
Maa Ka Bhi Aanchal Kahin Chhut Gaya

Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main
Zulmi Bada Dukhdayak Hoon Main
Hai Pyaar Kya Mujhko Kya Khabar

snippet.title: गोरी तेरा गाँव बड़ा प्यारा | Chitchor | K.J. Yesudas Songs | Amol Palekar | Zarina Wahab
snippet.description:
🎶 Step back in time to the golden era of Bollywood with the timeless voice of K.J. Yesudas! Relive the magic of 1976 with 'Gori Tera Gaon Bada Pyara' from the movie Chitchor, a song that captures the essence of pure love and rustic beauty. Yesudas's soulful rendition paints a vivid picture of innocent romance, transporting you to a simpler, more heartfelt time. His voice, like a gentle breeze, caresses the lyrics, making you fall in love with the melody all over again. Enjoy this beautiful classic with 

Credits :

Song: Gori Tera Gaon Bada Pyara
Album: Chitchor
Artist: K.J. Yesudas
Music Director: Ravindra Jain
Lyricist: Ravindra Jain 
 and 
Lyrics :

Gori teraa gaanv bada
Pyara main toh gaya
Mara aake yaha re
Uss par rup teraa sada
Chandrama jyon
Aadha aadha jawan re
Gori teraa gaanv bada pyara
Main toh gaya mara
Aake yaha re aake yaha re


Ji karta hai mor ke
Panv me payaliya pehna du
Kuhu kuhu gati koyaliya
Ko phulo kaa gehna du
Yahi ghar apna banane
Ko panchi kare dekho
Tinke jama re tinke jama re
Gori teraa gaanv bada pyara
Main toh gaya mara
Aake yaha re aake yaha re


Rang birange phul khile hain
Log bhi phulo jaise
Aa jaye ek bar yaha jo
Jayega phir kaise
Jhar jhar jharte huye jharne
Mann ko lage harne
Aisa kaha re aisa kaha re
Uss par rup teraa sada
Chandrama jyon aadha
Aadha jawan re
Aadha jawan re


Pardesi anjan ko aise
Koyi nahi apanata
Tum logo se jud gaya
Jaise janam janam kaa nata
Apni dhun me magan
Dole log yaha bole
Dil ki juban re
Dil ki juban re
Gori teraa gaanv
Bada pyara main toh gaya
Mara aake yaha re
Uss par rup teraa sada
Chandrama jyon aadha
Aadha jawan re. .

Feel the nostalgia, embrace the emotions, and let the music wrap you in its warmth. Share your favorite K.J. Yesudas song in the comments below! Like this video and subscribe for more timeless melodies.

Let the magic of music live on… ✨

snippet.title: FRANKLIN TRAPPED IN LAVA CITY 😱Indian Bikes Driving 3D @HeligamerSSS
snippet.description:
FRANKLIN TRAPPED IN LAVA CITY
Indian Bikes Driving 3D @HeligamerSSS

FRANKLIN TRAPPED IN LAVA CITY
Bikes Driving 3D @HeligamerssS
| Indian
In this intense gameplay of Indian Bikes Driving 3D, Franklin gets trapped inside a dangerous lava-filled city
The entire city is flooded with hot molten lava and buildings are burning everywhere!
As the situation becomes worse,
Spider-Man tries to help Franklin escape, while Hulk stands on top of the building watching the chaos unfold. The city turns into a complete disaster zone and survival becomes almost impossible.
Will Franklin be able to escape from this deadly lava city or is this the end?
Watch till the end for a shocking and action-packed escape!


Features in this video:
Lava Flooded City Gameplay
Franklin Survival Challenge
Spider-Man Rescue Mission

Game: Indian Bikes Driving 3D

snippet.title: Tu Tu Hai Wahi | Yeh Vaada Raha (1982) | Rishi Kapoor, Tina Munim | Kishore Kumar, Asha Bhosle Hits
snippet.description:
Relive the magic of true love with “Tu Tu Hai Wahi”, one of the most iconic romantic songs from the film Yeh Vaada Raha (1982). This timeless melody beautifully captures the feeling of rediscovering love and destiny, brought alive on screen by the charming Rishi Kapoor alongside Tina Munim and Poonam Dhillon.

🎶 Don’t forget to subscribe for more timeless hits by the legendary Kishore Kumar!  @kishorekumarhitsongs

👉 Follow us on Instagram :- https://www.instagram.com/wavemusic/
👉 Like us on Facebook :- https://www.facebook.com/WaveMusicIndiaofficial
👉Join Us on Whtsapp :- https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VacuoR1GpLHNjsDWYd2R
👉 Follow us on X ( Twitter ) :- https://x.com/WaveMusicWM?t=kKhpZOhFiLqswaThplIGBg&s=08

Lyrics - 

रोजे रोजे झगड़ा से बानी परेशान 
गलता शरीरिया हो बिना खान पान 
सुने के रोजाना मिले ताना रे सखी 
जिनगी में चैन मोर बा ना रे सखी 
सास ससुर भसुर केकरो बात नहीं सहब 
भत्तार लेके अलगा सखी पटना में रहब 

अंतरा 1st 👇 
ना चैन मिलेला ना करार मिलेला 
सासु ननदी के गारी बार बार मिलेला 
देवरों के रहन दुश्मन लागेला
मरचाइ खानी बोली छने छन लागेला
पिया जी के संग में घूमब पटना के मॉल में 
नया नया फिलिम देखब जाई के हॉल में
नईहर में माई से सारा बतिया कहब 
भत्तार लेके अलगा सखी पटना में रहब

अंतरा 2nd 👇 
ना सहात बाटे हो ना रहात बाटे हो 
दुख वाला सृष्टि के बात बाटे हो
सांचों आपन मन के बदलिए देहब 
ससुरार छोड़ी अब हम चलिए देहब 
रहे ना देहब आपन बाउर हालाते 
हमहू कमाईब जाके पिया जी के साथे 
आईब ना लौटी कबो भले ओनिए सड़ब
भत्तार लेके अलगा सखी पटना में रहब

Lyrics - 

रोजे रोजे झगड़ा से बानी परेशान 
गलता शरीरिया हो बिना खान पान 
सुने के रोजाना मिले ताना रे सखी 
जिनगी में चैन मोर बा ना रे सखी 
सास ससुर भसुर केकरो बात नहीं सहब 
भत्तार लेके अलगा सखी पटना में रहब 

अंतरा 1st 👇 
ना चैन मिलेला ना करार मिलेला 
सासु ननदी के गारी बार बार मिलेला 
देवरों के रहन दुश्मन लागेला
मरचाइ खानी बोली छने छन लागेला
पिया जी के संग में घूमब पटना के मॉल में 
नया नया फिलिम देखब जाई के हॉल में
नईहर में माई से सारा बतिया कहब 
भत्तार लेके अलगा सखी पटना में रहब

अंतरा 2nd 👇 
ना सहात बाटे हो ना रहात बाटे हो 
दुख वाला सृष्टि के बात बाटे हो
सांचों आपन मन के बदलिए देहब 
ससुरार छोड़ी अब हम चलिए देहब 
रहे ना देहब आपन बाउर हालाते 
हमहू कमाईब जाके पिया जी के साथे 
आईब ना लौटी कबो भले ओनिए सड़ब
भत्तार लेके अलगा सखी पटना में रहब

snippet.title: Zaalima 8K Video | Raees | Shah Rukh Khan | Arijit Singh & Harshdeep Kaur | JAM8
snippet.description:
To Stream & Download Full Song: 
Spotify - https://bit.ly/48PCkaG
JioSaavn - https://bit.ly/4taSqnv

Apple Music - https://apple.co/429NWSb
Amazon Prime Music - https://amzn.to/4tSFi6B
YouTube Music - https://amzn.to/4tSFi6B

Red Chillies Entertainment and Excel Entertainment Present
An Excel Entertainment Production.

Song - Zaalima
Music - JAM8
Lyrics - Amitabh Bhattacharya
Singers - Arijit Singh and Harshdeep Kaur
Choreography - Bosco- Caesar

Written by - Rahul Dholakia, Harit Mehta, Ashish Vashi & Niraj Shukla
Director Of Photography - K.U Mohanan ISC
Produced By - Ritesh Sidhwani, Gauri Khan & Farhan Akhtar
Directed By - Rahul Dholakia

Sound Design:- Dj Phukan, Sunny M.R.
Programmers:- Sourav Roy, Dj Phukan, Sunny M.R., Rohan Chauhan, Arijit Singh
Mix & Master:- Shadab Rayeen @ Newedge
Assistant:- Abhishek Sortey
Shoot Mix:- Ashwin Kulkarni
Recording Engineers:- Ashwin Kulkarni, Himanshu Shirlekar, Aaroh Velankar, Kaushik Das
Vocal Conductor:- Akashdeep Sengupta, Kaushik Das, Tushar Joshi

Musicians:-
Drums:- Alan Hertz
Bass:- Ernest Tibbs
Duff:- Iqbal Azad
Harmonium:- Feroz Shaikh
Acoustic Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily and Arijit Singh
Electric Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily 

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol De…
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol De…

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

#RaeesSongs #ShahRukhKhanSongs #ArijitSinghSongs

Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Hi from the beginning

What a fool, O cruel one, O cruel one

Your eyes are charming, your words are charming

I've been in love for a hundred years

My heart has been lost ever since

Your beauty was a symbol

Your every beat is you

Why should such a heart flutter

O cruel one, O cruel one

Your innocence is in my breath

You hide it, hide it...

Why should I express my love

You too should say it sometime, say it...

I will surely know

Your every excuse was yours

It started with you
It ended with you

My love story was a fairy tale

You are the flame, so remember

I too am a paradise
O cruel one, O Zaalima..

See you after meeting me
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tell me why I call you so mean..

snippet.title: MARHAMI 2.0  | The Song You Loved… Now Deeper | Official Audio • Vibe Chapters
snippet.description:
MARHAMI 2.0 💙 | The Love That Healed Me Again | Official Audio | Vibe Chapters

After the love and support on the original “MARHAMI”,
presenting its next chapter — MARHAMI 2.0.

This is not just a remake…
this is a deeper feeling.

MARHAMI 2.0 is about that same love,
but stronger, calmer, and more real.

Jab pehli baar kisi ne tumhe heal kiya tha,
aur phir tum samjhe —
ye sirf pyaar nahi…
ye sukoon hai.

This version carries more emotions,
more depth,
and a more personal connection.

It’s about finding someone
who doesn’t just love you…
but understands your silence,
heals your past,
and becomes your peace. 💙

If the first song touched your heart,
this one will stay in it.

Close your eyes, feel every beat,
and let MARHAMI 2.0 take you deeper into love. ✨


---

🎧 Available On

Spotify • Apple Music • JioSaavn • Gaana • Amazon Music • YouTube Music • Instagram Reels • Facebook

snippet.title: Kaavish - Intezaar
snippet.description:
Artist : Kaavish
Song : Intezaar

MUSIC
Lyrics : Jaffer Zaidi 
Bass : Waleed Attique

VIDEO
Director & Editor : Imam
Producer : Ovais Suhail 
Cinematographer : Babar Dahr
Art Director: Yamina Peerzada 
Focus Puller : Shakeel Shaukat 
Camera : Kap Camera Rental 
Lights & Crew : Popa Lights
Production Assistants : Muhammad Latif, Muhammad Aamir

Production Management : Alena Peerzada 
Artist management : Adil Awan

Lyrics:

تیرے انتظار میں
آشِیاں سجاؤں گا
ہوگا یہ مِلن کبھی
خود کو یہ بتاؤں گا

تیرے ہی وِصال سے
دل سکون پائے گا

درد انتظار کا
کیا، کِسے بتاؤں گا

ہو کے تیرے رُوبرو 
حالِ دل سناؤں گا

تب تلک یہ دل تیری
یاد میں ہی گائے گا

تیرے انتظار میں 

بے وجہ سے جیون میں
جینے کی وجہ تو ہے
سُونے سُونے آنگن میں
پیار کی ہَوا تو ہے
تیرے بِنا 
مر جاؤں نہ میں

تیرے انتظار میں 

یہ آگ یوں جَلتی رہے
یہ دل میرا، مجھ سے یہ کہے
کہ میں جَل جاؤں، پاؤں 
پیار، جو ہو نہ فنا

میں جَل جاؤں، پاؤں 
پیار، جو ہو نہ فنا

Aa gae, aa gae, aa gae

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri

Delhi ke ma kotti re

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri

do balka ki ma bngi ma lagu kati kavari si

Bin hi bja du kya

लव यू भाभी

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री
